properties.description: Holocene is a small, family-owned Oregon winery crafting minimal-intervention, terroir-driven Pinot Noir and Chardonnay from the Willamette Valley, and Cabernet Sauvignon from The Rocks District of Milton-Freewater. Founded by Todd and Carrie Alexander, the wines are celebrated for their balance, purity, and expressive connection to the land. A visit means experiencing a thoughtful, appointment-only tasting hosted by a family member, where you can savor vibrant, complex wines in an intimate setting. Each tasting will also include wines they craft in France, in the Châteauneuf-du-Pape and Côtes Catalanes regions.

properties.title: Hyland Estates
properties.description:
The remote, historic Hyland Vineyard is nestled in the foothills of the Oregon Coast Range in the McMinnville AVA. Pioneering wine legends, Dick Erath and Charles Coury undertook the colossal first plantings in 1971 with cool-climate, Alsatian varieties. A few years of careful tending resulted in 45 acres of own-rooted Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, Riesling and Gewürztraminer. Today, Hyland Vineyard is one of the Willamette Valley's oldest and largest vineyards, spanning 185 planted acres on volcanic Jory soil at elevations that range between at 650'-900'. 

Hyland Estates winery produces a boutique selection of wines crafted exclusively from Hyland Vineyard, from the best of these iconic vines. Additionally, this vineyard continues to be the source of fruit for many top scoring wines from some of Oregon's most recognized producers. 

Although the vineyard is not open to the public, the Hyland Estates tasting room is conveniently located just north of Highway 99W at the western edge of Dundee, on the NW Wine Company campus.

properties.title: Illahe Vineyards
properties.description: At Illahe, our goal is to make wine as naturally as possible from the soil to the bottle. This requires working by hand on small lots with age-old techniques and materials.Our focus is to make and grow quality pinot noir and white wines that express the vintage and their varietal characteristics. We don't use enzymes or additives, and we don't fine or filter our pinot noir. Some of our lots are made entirely by hand with no electricity or mechanization. We use a gentle wooden basket press, and age our pinot noir in French and Oregon oak.Of course, quality wine starts with quality fruit in the vineyard. Our 80-acre, south-facing vineyard lives in shallow clay soils. Like our friends in the Deep Roots Coalition, we do not irrigate mature plants. As one of Oregons few horse-powered vineyards, we utilize a team of Percheron drafts and Norwegian Fjords to mow and deliver grapes to the winery at harvest.

properties.title: iOTA Cellars
properties.description: iOTA Cellars produces elegant pinot noir, chardonnay and Rosé from its onsite winery located at Pelos Sandberg Vineyard Estate, nestled in the Eola-Amity Hills. Our wines are hand-crafted with 100% estate-grown, sustainably farmed fruit for a total production under 1500 cases. To learn more about us, please visit our website and Facebook page.

properties.title: Iterum Wines
properties.description:
Iterum (Latin)
(it′ər·əm) again; once more, afresh

Started in 2019 by Proprietor and Winemaker, Joe Dobbes, Iterum Wines produces small production Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, Sauvignon Blanc and Traditional Sparkling Wine. After more than three decades in the industry, it became clear to Joe that it was time to go full circle, and to get small again. In 2018 Joe and his wife Patricia purchased their dream property, which they named Orchard House Vineyard. The organically farmed 21 acre estate, located on the west slope of the Eola-Amity Hills, is now home to his new project, Iterum Wines. 

Joe’s purpose behind Iterum is to get back to his roots. He is just where he wants to be, back in the vineyard kicking the dirt, farming, creating, experimenting, and he’s rejuvenated. He’s emerged with a hyper focused vision and is making the most exciting wines of his life. In addition to Iterum’s estate wine program, Iterum produces a handful of “Old Friends”, special bottling from unique vineyards he has had the opportunity to work with during his 30+ years in the winemaking industry.

Tasting Experiences and Purchasing Reservations are by appointment only.

properties.title: J. Christopher Wines
properties.description:
J. Christopher produces an array of wines that elegantly capture the distinctive character of Oregon’s Northern Willamette Valley. Owned by internationally renowned winegrower, Erni Loosen (also owner of Appassionata Estate, where the wines are produced), the focus is on expressive Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, Riesling, and Sauvignon Blanc made using the patient, unhurried approach of the Old World. Fruit for J. Christopher Wines is sourced from excellent growers in several different sub-appellations of the Willamette Valley. With a deep commitment to environmentally sustainable farming and production practices, the mission of J. Christopher Wines is to produce terroir-driven wines in an age-worthy style that emphasizes finesse, length, and balance.
Our tasting room is open daily from 10 am - 5 pm, and reservations are not required. A $20 tasting fee showcases a selection of six wines, and one tasting fee is waived per 2 bottles of wine purchased.

properties.title: Jachter Family Wines
properties.description:
For more than 27 years, Dave Jachter owned and operated several successful car dealerships in Oregon. You may recall his tag line “And That’s No Bull!” His innovative approaches and commitment to local communities saw him through a successful career and impressive awards in the auto industry, including Time magazine’s Dealer of the Year nomination. Through those decades, Dave cultivated a passion for wine, and a cellar to match. Dave sold his car businesses recently and decided that, instead of retiring, he would turn to the world of wine. In addition to being a Northwest wine fan, Dave has travelled to France, Italy, and California wine regions, and tasted wines from around the world. He studied at UC Davis, completing a variety of viticultural courses to refine his expertise.

He and his wife, Karen, purchased a beautiful piece of land that totals 120 acres in the Chehalem Mountains AVA in the heart of the Willamette Valley.

While waiting for his vineyards to produce, Dave did not sit on his laurels. In addition to constructing a state-of-the-art tasting room, winery, and barrel room, Dave and winemaker Jared secured fruit from locally owned vineyards with likeminded organic farming practices for the 2019 - 2022 vintages. The 2023 vintage will be the first year that is crafted with 100% estate grown fruit. 

Perhaps we all can remember exactly when we fell in love with wine. For Dave, his fascination for wine was ignited in 1975. After finishing final college exams, he and a buddy headed to a fine restaurant and asked the waiter to bring to the table a good red wine. “How about a GREAT red wine?” asked the server. It was a Château de Beaucastel, Châteauneuf-du-Pape (often said to be among the greatest wines of France). A passion was born, and Dave was forever hooked on wine! His goal now is to produce the finest quality Oregon wines possible.

Dave will continue his generous work in public service in his new endeavor. He and Karen are firm believers in giving back to the community. Dave and Karen intend to donate a large percentage of all profits from Jachter Family Wines to the local community.

properties.title: K&M Wines, Alchemy Vineyard
properties.description: K&M Wines, Alchemy Vineyard is a small, 4-acre vineyard located on the south side of Parrett Mountain where we grow Chardonnay and Pinot noir. We complete our lineup with varietals we love from Oregon and Washington. The name, Alchemy Vineyard, represents change and transformation. We make small production, food friendly wines. Come visit our tasting room in Carlton, the most walkable wine town in Oregon and experience our hospitality and exceptional wines. Ken Morrison and Mauro Hernandez, Wine Growers.

properties.title: King Estate Winery
properties.description: King Estate is delighted to share its stunning location, warm hospitality and acclaimed wines with visitors. Check our website for the latest hours for our Restaurant and Tasting Room. Established in 1991, King Estate is located in Eugene in the Willamette Valley AVA. At 1,033 acres, it is the largest certified Biodynamic® vineyard in North America. King Estate is famed for its world-class Oregon Pinot Gris and Pinot Noir, produced along with a diverse array of other varietals and single-vineyard wines. To this day, King Estate is owned and operated by the King family.

properties.title: Knudsen Vineyards
properties.description:
Step into the legacy of one of Oregon's wine pioneers! Founded in 1971 by Cal Knudsen and Julia Lee, Knudsen Vineyards is a historic family-owned gem. Nestled in the heart of Dundee Hills, our 130-acre vineyard has a rich heritage of producing acclaimed wines.

Knudsen Vineyards is one of Oregon's oldest and largest family-owned vineyards. It is also the original site of Bonded Winery No. 52, the first commercial winery in the Dundee Hills. 

Knudsen Vineyard was a primary supplier of grapes to Knudsen Erath Winery from 1975 through 1986 and has been a leading supplier of fruit to Argyle Winery since 1987. 

In 2014, the Knudsen family returned to winemaking under its own label, and in 2020 they opened The Outlook at Knudsen Vineyards tasting room.

We produce Chardonnay, Rosé of Pinot noir, Pinot Noir and Sparkling wines.

properties.title: Kramer Vineyards
properties.description: Kramer Vineyards is a family owned and operated winery, now in its second generation. For nearly 40 years, they have been growing grapes at their sustainably farmed vineyard in the Yamhill-Carlton AVA. Enjoy a tasting of white, red, or sparkling wines at their charming tasting room in Gaston, 30 miles west of Portland.

properties.title: L'Angolo Estate
properties.description: Our family project keeps a simple focus: To make and share exceptional, estate-only Pinot Noir and Chardonnay from our 20-acre vineyard tucked away in the Dundee Hills. We blend traditional winemaking with a modern design sensibility to lift place and time to their highest expression.

properties.title: La Biblioteca Wine
properties.description:
La Biblioteca wines are stories we pour for each other. 
Our sustainably-grown, organically-farmed estate vineyard, Aegrina, is located in McMinnville and is our primary fruit source. Our legendary Burgundian winemaker, Francois Millet, lends his old-world expertise to our limited quantity production. The resulting wines are incredibly high-quality examples of Willamette Valley Pinot Noir and Chardonnay to be savored by wine lovers — and storytellers — everywhere. 
Our tasting room is conveniently located in downtown Dundee on the first floor of the Dundee Hotel. We welcome the curious to visit and enjoy these specially crafted wines.

properties.title: Lachini Vineyards
properties.description:
By appointment. Two locations - The Villa at the Estate Vineyard in Newberg & Winery in Tualatin (Fall - Spring). Each offers a different experience from a picnic or seated tasting flight while you enjoy the charm and serene views of the Willamette Valley at the vineyard to the rustic urban winery environment for tastings or events. Private tasting experiences available with special tasting flights, vineyard walk/tour of our Biodynamic farming practices and chef-prepared lunches for private groups up to 20. Founded in 1998, the Lachini Family believes that the vineyard is the wine and nurtures their 45-acre vineyard's distinctive terroir and producing world class Pinot noirs of prodigious quality with the goal for generations to come. Meticulous management of each vine is through biodynamic/organic farming practices, while they combine state of the art winemaking and old-world technique to handcraft wines of complexity and grace- each one, believed, a reflection of its soul and unique place. You are invited to delight your senses through the lens of a glass. 

SOUL, PASSION, INTENSE, ADVENTUROUS, SUSTAINABLE, CONNECT, BALANCE, SINGULAR, QUALITY, HEALTH, LAUGHTER, HEARTACHE, PERSISTENCE, FAMILY & FRIENDS, GRATEFUL, GOOD TIMES, CELEBRATE! Salute'! Ron & Marianne Lachini

properties.title: Lange Estate Winery & Vineyards
properties.description: Founded in 1987, Lange Estate is located in the heart of the Dundee Hills. Since the winery’s inception, the Lange family has focused on producing elegant, meticulously crafted examples of pinot noir, chardonnay, and pinot gris. Now spanning 60 acres, the property boasts a state-of-the-art winery and hospitality center. The tasting room features stunning panoramic views of vineyards, densely forested rolling valleys, and the Cascade Mountain Range. This destination winery has grown over the past thirty-five years to become an integral part of the renowned Willamette Valley appellation.

properties.title: Laurel Ridge Winery
properties.description: Founded in 1986, Laurel Ridge has a rich history and is an estate winery in the Yamhill-Carlton AVA. Finn Hill, our estate vineyard is one of the first Willakenzie soil vineyards planted. Come relax with us and taste our award winning Pinot Noir, Rosé of Pinot Noir and Pinot Gris along with our portfolio of other wonderful wines which includes some blends and single varietal big reds.

properties.title: Lavinea
properties.description:
Our Name
(Lah-Vin-E-Yah)
meaning... ‘of the vine’.

Founded in 2014, Lavinea is committed to becoming a benchmark producer of wines of place in the Willamette Valley, crafting wines that represent the purest voice of site-specific terroir from each of our vineyards.

Thank you for your interest in LAVINEA. We are accepting Reservations for groups up to six in our Tasting Room located at 250 N. Kutch St. in Carlton. We are open Thursday through Monday, with Reservations beginning at 11am until the last Reservation at 3:pm.

Your LAVINEA host will join you at your table and guide you through this highly personalized exploration of our acclaimed wines, along with selections from our Library. Your host will share and discuss information on our winemaking, recent vintages and the vineyards, each of which have earned either Organic, LIVE or Salmon-Safe certifications. We suggest you allow 90 minutes for this exclusive Tasting. We will be happy to apply the value of one tasting fee to each six-bottle purchase.

All of us in the Willamette Valley wine community are so grateful for the support of wine lovers near and far throughout the past few years. We can’t wait to see you in Willamette Valley wine country! Currently, we are unable to accept pets, or anyone under the age of 21.

properties.title: Le Cadeau Vineyard
properties.description: Le Cadeau Pinot noir is the result of meticulous winegrowing and winemaking practices. Our vineyard is located on a high-elevation volcanic basalt hillside, and is often described as the rockiest vineyard in Oregon. From this extraordinary place comes distinctive Oregon Pinot noir. Our tasting room is conveniently located in downtown Dundee just off Hwy 99W at The Dundee Hotel.

properties.title: Left Coast Estate
properties.description: Driving up the long, winding road to the Tasting Room, you'll see the product of our unremitting efforts: lovingly cultivated gardens, fields of wildflowers, and meticulously tended vines. Working to fulfill our commitments to the strengths and benefits of biodiversity, we strive to be the best possible stewards of the land. Left Coast Estate situated on the 45th parallel consists of 500 acres, 137 of which are devoted to the cultivation of grapes. Planting on varying soils, elevations and slopes contributes to the complexities and subtleties of our wines. The remainder of the property is preserved as one of the last stands of old growth white oak trees in the area and also contains fruit orchards and streams. The bodies of water attract migrating birds and encourage birds of prey, helping to balance animal life in the vineyards. Founded in 2003, Left Coast Estate carefully crafts exclusively estate-grown Pinot Noir, Pinot Gris, Chardonnay, Pinot Blanc, Viognier, Pinot Meunier and Syrah. Our Tasting Room & Farm Market Café is open daily, from 12 pm-5 pm with food service until 4:30pm.

properties.title: Lemelson Vineyards
properties.description: Eric Lemelson planted 3/4 of an acre of Pinot noir on a hillside farm east of Newberg in 1995. He enjoyed viticulture so much that within three years he planted more than 30 additional acres near Carlton and began to design the present day winery. Today, Lemelson Vineyards owns and manages over 124 acres at five sites spanning three AVAs. Each of the five estate vineyards have been farmed organically since the time their vines were first planted. Notably, all five vineyards have been certified organic by Oregon Tilth each year since October of 2004. The gravity-flow winery reflects a strong commitment to sustainability and a no compromises approach to quality winemaking.

properties.title: Lenné Estate
properties.description:
Lenné Estate was founded in 2000 on a ferociously rocky hillside in the northern Willamette Valley. Our 15.5 acre vineyard produces some of the finest quality pinot noir in Oregon, and we make our wines in a minimalist style, allowing the terroir to show through while preserving the profoundly rich, dense, fruit-forward flavors. 

What sets Lenné apart from other Oregon Pinot Noirs? Location, location, location. Our site is a steep, south-facing slope situated at the ideal elevation and orientation, and our uniquely difficult soil creates deep-rooted vines which produce small-clusters of grapes with amazing character and complexity. Lenné wines have a distinct mocha-like aroma, a strong mid-palate texture, and a lingering finish.

Our tasting space reopened in April 2025 after a massive renovation, and the new building, grounds, patio, and views are breathtaking.  We'd love to host you on your next visit to Oregon's premiere wine country.

properties.title: Lingua Franca
properties.description: Lingua Franca is dedicated to making wines that express the exceptional terroir of Lingua Franca Estate and the eastern slopes of the Eola-Amity Hills. After decades of tasting wine from the region, sommelier Larry Stone sought out a site to plant a vineyard that was capable of the structure and complexity found in the finest terroir-driven wines in Europe. In order to express the unique flavors of Lingua Franca Estate most precisely, Larry sought out Burgundy-trained Thomas Savre, who leads the winemaking team, and who is guided by iconic Burgundy winemaker Dominique Lafon. Our home vineyard is located on the winery site and we are open for tastings every day of the week!

properties.title: Lonesome Rock
properties.description:
We welcome guests to an intimate, owner-hosted wine tasting at our estate vineyard in the hills just west of Carlton, Oregon. Created for those who enjoy a deeper connection to both wine and place, each visit offers a relaxed yet informative deep dive into our Willamette Valley Pinot Noir and Chardonnay.

Tastings are led personally by the owners, offering rare access to the people and place behind the vineyard, the cellar, and the long-term vision of the estate. Conversations are tailored to your interests, whether focused on site expression, vintage variation, winemaking philosophy, or our story.

Each appointment features a selection of current releases, complemented when possible by library wines that illustrate the aging potential and continuity of our wines over time.

Lonesome Rock Cellars is an active vineyard, and visits are available by reservation only. Walk-ins cannot be accommodated. For same-day inquiries, please call or text 847-308-9019 and we will respond if availability allows.

$30 per guest
Fee waived with a three-bottle purchase or enrollment in our Private Client Membership

properties.title: Love & Squalor Wine at Portland Wine Company
properties.description:
Portland Wine Company is the urban winery home of Love & Squalor, Garageland, Pet Matt, Marty the Behemoth, and Mothershucker wines. Husband-and-wife team Matt Berson and Angie Reat have been crafting small-batch Oregon wines since 2006, and in 2019 they opened their Southeast Portland winery and tasting room so you don’t have to drive “allllll the way to the valley” to enjoy them.
Their approach is simple: thoughtful, hands-on winemaking that showcases Oregon’s terroir without unnecessary fuss. From Pinot Noir and Riesling to playful orange wines, pét-nats, and bold red blends, each label has its own personality. You’ll also find limited releases with whimsical names like Antsy Pants Reserve, A Frayed Knot, and Walks on Gilded Splinters—a nod to the team’s love of music, wordplay, and a good laugh. (Fun fact: they’re avid Scrabble players, though Angie admits Matt always wins thanks to her “creative” spelling.)
The tasting room, located at 3201 SE 50th Ave, is equal parts cozy hangout and community hub. Visitors can drop in for a casual flight, book a guided tasting, or join special events like Spin the Bottle, guest winemaker nights, and wine club gatherings. Whether you’re a seasoned collector, a curious first-timer, or simply in search of a great glass with good company, Portland Wine Company offers a relaxed, classy, and distinctly Portland wine experience.

properties.title: LucidWild Estate
properties.description:
LUCIDWILD ESTATE
Legacy + Modern + Immersive 

LucidWild Estate represents the modern era of the Dundee Hills. Here, the pioneering spirit of Willamette Valley top-rated winemaking converges with a contemporary and immersive experience. Built upon revered red Jory soils and rooted in a deep respect for the 28-year old single-vineyard Pinot Noir and Chardonnay vines, our family-owned and operated estate honors the region's iconic legacy while redefining the winery experience.
From the sweeping and breathtaking SkyTerraces to the intimate WineCaves, LucidWild has created a luxurious, adults-only winery sanctuary. Through French-influenced traditional small-production winemaking, meticulous dry-farming with sustainable farming practices, and award-winning architecture, LucidWild is a gathering place for wine lovers, couples, and friends seeking a truly memorable and immersive escape.
LucidWild is authentic and world-class winemaking in its most immersive form—a design-forward estate where every detail reflects an uncompromising commitment to quality, craft, conservation and the art of unhurried discovery.

“There is absolutely nothing like LucidWild in the Valley. Heck, I don’t think there is anything like it in Oregon, and probably not in Washington either.” - AJ Weinnotes

VISIT US
Elite Hospitality + Design + Breathtaking 

A visit to LucidWild is an invitation to the exceptional. We are a single-vineyard estate where every moment is designed for immersion, not distraction. Whether you are a collector or simply seeking refuge from the ordinary, our award-winning SkyTerraces + WineCaves await.

Signature LucidWild Experience
Our flagship estate tasting features a flight of five single-vineyard estate wines, perfectly paired with seasonal small bites curated by our acclaimed in-house executive chef.
Explore and Experience LucidWild Estate
Step into a new dimension of winery hospitality:

SkyTerraces: Luxuriously designed tasting areas perched at over 800 feet above the estate vineyard with panoramic and breathtaking views

WineCaves: Subterranean elegance for intimate tastings, dining and lounging 

RecRoom: Blending leisure and healthy competition with curated games, such as bocce ball, shuffle board, billiards, and comfortable lounges, creating the ideal setting to strengthen and build relationships

Caviar & Sparkling: The ultimate wine and food pairing in a luxury, sophisticated setting

Jellies Speakeasy: Members-only lounge featuring vintage vinyl, mesmerizing jellyfish tanks, craft cocktails and private spirits collection

Vineyard/Farm Tour: Explore the single-vineyard estate that shapes our acclaimed wines and visit the adorable mini-highland cows, Valais Blacknose sheep, honeybees, and llamas

LucidWild Wheels: The journey matters just as much as the destination. Our custom-appointed Mercedes Sprinter van offers seamless, luxurious transport for up to 8 guests, ensuring your arrival and departure are as exceptional as your visit

Every detail at LucidWild supports your objectives, offering the kind of curated experience your friends, family and colleagues will remember long after their visit to the breathtaking estate vineyard.	

“LucidWild will flip your expectations of what a wine tasting experience can be.” - Willamette Week


CORPORATE GATHERINGS
Strategy + Inspiration + Collaboration

LucidWild offers a distinctive setting where business objectives and creative breakthroughs converge. We provide the focused environment leadership teams require—free from distraction and designed for meaningful, inspirational and collaborative work.

IdeaLab: Host your off-site in a light-filled and contemporary board room surrounded by vineyards and engineered for high-level strategy

Working Lunch: Gather on the SkyTerraces for a meal or presentation with sweeping views of the Dundee Hills

Board Dinners: Reserve the WineCaves for an intimate evening that pairs conversation with world-class wine and culinary experience

LucidWild Wheels: The journey matters just as much as the destination. Our custom-appointed luxury Mercedes Sprinter van offers seamless, luxurious transportation, ensuring your group’s arrival and departure are as exceptional as your experience

Every detail supports your objectives, offering the kind of experience your colleagues will remember long after ideas are hatched and decisions are made.

“LucidWild has a space for every experience. Explore a property designed for gathering, celebration and wonder.” - Travel Dundee


PRIVATE EVENTS
Celebrations + Elevated + Imagined

At LucidWild Estate, we curate private events that are as unique as they are unforgettable. Whether you are planning a milestone celebration or an elegant wine-paired dinner, our team specializes in effortless luxury and fully bespoke experiences. With a collection of state-of-the-art architectural spaces, your event is limited only by your imagination.
Let us handle the details while you host with style.

“Oregon Wine Country’s Most Sought After Venues: No. 1 - LucidWild Estate Bold, unforgettable, next level luxe.” - J29 Events


SUSTAINABLE FARMING ETHOS
Stewardship + Sustainability + Biodiversity

Great wine begins with a healthy ecosystem. LucidWild is proud to be LIVE Certified (Low Input Viticulture & Enology) as well as Salmon Safe and Bee Friendly certified to ensure our farming practices protect and preserve the land and local waterways.

Power of Dry Farming
We practice 100% dry farming, a method that relies solely on natural rainfall. By not utilizing irrigation, it conserves a precious natural resource and forces the vine roots deep into the volcanic Jory soil to find the water source. This effort is essential to the quality our single-vineyard estate wines:

Intensity: Vines produce smaller berries with a higher skin-to-juice ratio.

Flavor: This results in naturally balanced wines with intense concentration and complex layering.

Precision: We hand-thin grape clusters and practice 100% hand-harvesting and sorting of the dry-farmed vineyard, ensuring only the most perfect fruit reaches the fermentation tank.

Living Breathing Vineyard + Regenerative Farming 
LucidWild has dedicated over 15% of the estate to natural habitat, supporting the native grasses, pollinators, wildlife as well as preserving the oak and Douglas Fir trees that keep our ecosystem in balance.
By promoting and supporting biodiversity, we invite beneficial neighbors like owls, hawks, deer, coyotes and kestrels. Their natural hunting instincts provide essential pest control without the need for chemicals. This harmony between predator and landscape strengthens soil health, reduces intervention, and allows our vines to express the true character of the Dundee Hills.

At LucidWild, biodiversity isn’t an afterthought—it’s a vital pillar of regenerative farming and the foundation behind wines of purity, precision, and place.

“It’s a quiet reminder that at LucidWild care is more than service, it’s stewardship.” - Thirsty Thursday: Inside the Willamette Valley


AUTHENTIC WINEMAKING + ACCLAIMED WINES 

Nestled in the heart of Oregon’s renowned Dundee Hills, LucidWild is where sustainable farming meets a true sense of place. Guided by the ethos of "Putting the Land Before the Hand," LucidWild is dedicated to crafting ultra-premium, limited-production, single-vineyard estate wines that serve as an honest and authentic expression of the 27-year-old, dry-farmed vines.

Minimalist Winemaking 
LucidWild’s approach is one of stewardship and patience. We believe that truly exceptional wine is made in the vineyard. Our estate is 100% dry-farmed, forcing our vines to root deeply into the volcanic Jory soil, resulting in smaller berries with intense concentration and complex flavor profiles.
In the cellar, acclaimed winemaker Isabelle Meunier (classically trained in Burgundy and New Zealand) employs a minimalist, low-intervention touch to allow the vineyard to speak for itself.

Native Fermentation: We use only indigenous yeasts to highlight the natural elements of the single-vineyard estate

Extended Élevage: Wines are aged in French oak for 12–16 months to develop structure and texture and over 6 months in the bottle to ensure seamless integration and harmony before release

Sustainable Purity: We are LIVE Certified, Salmon Safe, and Bee Friendly, ensuring our farming regenerates the land for future generations.

Internationally Acclaimed Pinot Noir, Chardonnay and Sparkling Wines
LucidWild’s limited-production, single-vineyard estate wines have quickly garnered global attention, earning top-tier scores from the world’s most respected critics. Each wine is a distinct study of our estate’s unique soil, elevation and diversity of French clones. 

Chosen Pinot Noir
Chosen Pinot Noir is a limited barrel selection of our finest barrels of the vintage. The Chosen represents the ultimate expression of elegance and complexity and has garnered some of the highest international ratings in the world: 96 Points International Wine Report; 96 Points Northwest Wine Report; 96 Points Paul Gregutt NW Wine Guide; 95 Points Wine Spectator; 95 Points Wine Enthusiast; and 94 Points Decanter. 

Beast Pinot Noir
Beast Pinot Noir is from the estate’s darker, bolder, and brooding clones and showcases the intense, iron-rich character of the Dundee Hills. International critics have also rated the Beast among the top Pinot Noirs in the world: 96 Points International Wine Report; 96 Points Northwest Wine Report; 96 Points Paul Gregutt NW Wine Guide; and 94 Points Wine Spectator.

Renegade Pinot Noir
Renegade Pinot Noir defines itself through complex contradictions: brooding yet fresh, rich yet balanced with notes of tea leaf, black cherry, dried herbs, and coffee grounds emerge from a richly textured palate. With 32% whole cluster fermentation, it offers exceptional structure and a finish that is truly endless. 95 Points - Northwest Wine Report; 94 Points Paul Gregutt NW Wine Guide.

Fusion Pinot Noir
Fusion Pinot Noir is harmony and balance with a seamless integration of our estate’s diverse clones, offering a perfect snapshot of the estate’s vintage in a single bottle. 95 Points Paul Gregutt NW Wine Guide; 94 Points International Wine Report; 94 Points Northwest Wine Report; 94 Points Wine Enthusiast (Editors’ Choice).

Hidden Chardonnay
Hidden Chardonnay draws focus and finesse from a bright, mineral-driven Chardonnay that rivals the world’s finest White Burgundies, marked by electric acidity and a long, saline finish. 95 Points International Wine Report; 95 Points Northwest Wine Report; 95 Points Paul Gregutt NW Wine Guide; 94 Points Decanter.

Lust Vintage Blanc de Blancs Sparkling
Lust Blanc de Blanc Sparkling is a compelling, modern expression of 100% Chardonnay (Blanc de Blancs). Aged on lees for over three years, this sparkling wine balances bright energy with deep complexity and aromas of pear, brioche, hazelnut, and lemon that surprises with textural richness. 95 Points Paul Gregutt NW Wine Guide; 93 Points Northwest Wine Report (Sean P. Sullivan); 93 Points International Wine Report.

“Step into a space that puts just as much thought into your experience as it does its wines” - More Than Just Vine

LucidWild News Articles:
https://lucidwildestate.com/news/wild-by-design-oregon-wine-press/

https://lucidwildestate.com/news/top-60-wines-2025/

https://lucidwildestate.com/news/lucidwild-regenerative-islands/

Photographed by Arhaus and @dianatodorovaphotography and Auburn Photography.

properties.title: Lundeen Wines
properties.description:
A native Oregonian, Michael Lundeen's calling to make wine in the Willamette Valley began at home. His is a story of generations; of discovery and passion passed from father to son. Four generations of Lundeens have cared for the land and vines that are now the heartbeat of Michael's wines. It's also home, where Michael and his family still live to this day.
Never hesitant to raise the bar, Michael has always advocated that worthwhile winemaking isn’t a process of repetition – it’s reflective, forward-looking, adaptive and humble. His wines favor place over flash; are the conduit to express his deep love for the Willamette Valley and reflect the beauty and complexity that is distinctly Oregon.

properties.title: Lytle-Barnett
properties.description:
“French Tradition meets Oregon Authenticity”

Lytle-Barnett crafts exceptional vintage méthode champenoise sparkling wines from the Eola-Amity Hills, blending French tradition with Oregon authenticity. Our bubbles are a celebration of passion, precision, and quality made possible through the collaboration between Co-Founder Andy Lytle and Director of Winemaking Andrew Davis. Experience the very best in sparkling wine at our tasting room in downtown Dundee.

properties.title: Matzinger Davies Wine Company
properties.description: Matzinger Davies is a collaboration between longtime Willamette Valley winemakers Anna Matzinger & Michael Davies. We produce wines with a resonant voice speaking to their geographic origin, varietal typicity and season. Our focus is small lot, AVA based Pinot Noir and Chardonnay from the Willamette Valley and single vineyard Sauvignon Blanc and Grenache from the Columbia Gorge. Join us by appointment in our tasting salon for a private seated tasting with Anna Matzinger in downtown McMinnville.

properties.title: Maysara Winery Momtazi Vineyard
properties.description: Nestled in the foothills of the McMinnville AVA, our certified Biodynamic vineyard captures unique characteristics from some of the oldest soils in the state. Our Momtazi vineyard is holistically farmed using only estate-made compost and herbal teas to nourish healthy vines and return fruit of the highest quality. Maysara Wines reflect this commitment to terroir, showing a purity of fruit and earth, that are true to the soils from which they come.

properties.title: MonksGate Vineyard
properties.description: Our 20+ year old vineyard long trod by nearby monks is nestled in the east hills of the Yamhill-Carlton AVA atop ancient marine sedimentary material.  Sunny days and coastal breezes provide the ideal climate for ripening while 2nd generation grower Rebecca, along with her beloved Airedale Fizzy, oversees each detail and works closely with winemaker Drew Voit to assure our Estate grown wines embody place, passion and seasonality. Relax in rustic elegance by a fire or on one of our scenic patios and take in the views!

properties.title: Montinore Estate
properties.description:
Established in 1982, Montinore Estate is one of the largest producers of certified Biodynamic wines in the country. With our 200-acre Demeter Certified Biodynamic and CCOF Certified Organic vineyard located in the Tualatin Hills AVA, we focus on producing superior Pinot Noirs, cool climate whites, and fascinating Italian varietals.

Join us for a Montinore Estate tasting at the Grove! Located in the old Cornerstone Coffee Roasters building in the heart of McMinnville, The Grove tasting room is home to two acclaimed Oregon wineries: Montinore Estate and Landlines Estates. These two wineries have a shared commitment to sustainability rooted in Biodynamic and organic farming practices and thoughtful winemaking. The result is beautifully crafted wines that are true expressions of their respective terroirs.

properties.title: Namaste Vineyards
properties.description: The Spirit of the Wine, Honors the Spirit of the Vine. With this mantra, we use only the finest grapes handpicked from our five estate vineyards to produce fine Pinot Noirs and elegant white wines . Each vineyard block is nestled among gently rolling hills in Oregon's world renowned Willamette Valley, in the Van Duzer Corridor AVA. Our deepest reds use premier grapes sourced only from very select partner vineyards, exclusively for their rich and bold flavor profiles. Handcrafted in style, we produce wines with great balance and complexity allowing each individual vineyard block to express its true nature and unique character. Our newly renovated tasting room has beautiful views, both inside and out, from a stone tasting counter and fireplace, to valley and vineyard views that stretch for miles. From our vineyard to your table, every meal is enhanced with the right bottle of wine. We are delighted and thankful for this invitation to dine with you.

properties.title: Natalie’s Estate Winery
properties.description:
Natalie's Estate Winery has been committed to excellence since 1999 and is a family-owned boutique winery dedicated to handcrafting small quantities of ultra-premium wines. 

We have a large selection of varietals such as Chardonnay, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Sangiovese, Meritage, Cabernet Franc, Rose of Pinot Noir, Malbec, Petite Verdot, Syrah, Zinfandel, Pinot Gris, Pinot Noir, and other rich &robust red blends. Our wines have intense varietal character, showing distinct personalities reflective of their terroir using traditional European winemaking techniques. 

We offer Elevated Tasting Experiences where you can choose personalized tours and tastings with our owner/winemaker including Barrel & Wine Tasting with our Winemaker; Vineyard Tour and Wine Tasting, Private Blending Class, and a Private Tasting. For groups or teams, we offer a Winemaker reception for up to 35 guests and also a sumptuous Four-Course Vineyard Cuisine Dinner at the winery. 

Our vineyards and varietals represent their distinctly different terroir. These superb wines are built to age gracefully with complex characteristics distinctive of where they were grown. 

We select fruit from the finest Pacific Northwest vineyards as well as our Willamette Valley Pinot Noir Estate Vineyard. The owners, Boyd and Cassandra Teegarden are involved in every step of the way including hosting you in the welcoming tasting room! 

Natalie's Estate Winery is nestled in the quiet foothills of the Chehalem Mountain AVA in Oregon's Willamette Valley. 

We are proud partners with Tour Devine by Heli to host guests coming by helicopter to our property. 

Come visit and enjoy the wines and setting! We are open by appointment only. Call us at 503-807-5008 to make a reservation.

properties.title: Native Flora
properties.description: Native Flora is a small, secluded vineyard and winery hidden high in the famed Dundee Hills. Founded in 2005, we strive to produce premium estate wines in limited quantities for people who enjoy great wine, a good laugh, natural beauty and a more personal wine experience.Surrounded on three sides by forest and open sky on the fourth, the physical site is a haven from bustle, and a setting for stunning vistas. There is an inherent sense of tranquility filled with plenty of purpose. Visitors readily agree we truly are a sanctum - a private place where one is free from intrusion.Despite the inherent exclusivity of our diminutive size, we remain down to earth, hospitable, and enthusiastic about sharing our chosen path in life. Our aim is to enlist you not just as a customer, but as a new friend and fellow enthusiast of good wines and places.Our winery, tasting areas and home are all rolled into one surprising structure and endeavor. When you walk into our tasting room you have literally walked into our life. Welcome.-Scott & Denise Flora

properties.title: Nicolas-Jay
properties.description: Nicolas-Jay is the story of a three-decade friendship between famed Burgundian winemaker Jean-Nicolas Meo and visionary music entrepreneur Jay Boberg, and their shared love of Oregon Pinot Noir. It is also the story of their desire to build something lasting together, while creating a distinctive expression of great Willamette Valley Pinot Noir. At Nicolas-Jay, this is achieved by applying viticultural and winemaking experience gained from working with the grands crus of Burgundy to the finest grapes from Oregon. This includes fruit from the older vines of Nicolas-Jay’s own organically farmed Bishop Creek Vineyard on the hillsides of the Yamhill-Carlton appellation, as well as grapes from other top Willamette Valley vineyards, including Nysa, Momtazi, Hyland and La Colina.. From this fruit, Jean-Nicolas, Jay and talented Associate Winemaker Tracy Kendall make alluring and expressive wines that convey the special character of Oregon Pinot Noir.

properties.title: Norris Wines
properties.description: Norris Wines is a family owned estate driven project focused on crafting site specific Oregon Pinot Noir and Riesling in the Ribbon Ridge AVA. Each year brings a different look at the sense of place. Visit our estate winery to get a deep appreciation of the everyday happenings of a small 12-acre vineyard.

properties.title: North Valley Vineyards
properties.description:
A PRIVILEGED PLACE
We use the phrase “North Valley” as a geographical reference to the area from which we source, farm and produce our artisan Pinot Noirs, Chardonnays and dry Rose. While the “Willamette Valley” appellation describes a fairly large area (almost 160 miles long, and nearly 45 miles at its widest) it is in the much smaller, northern corner of this region where its overall best vineyards are found. Here in the “North Valley”, we work to nurture and craft our artisan wines, honoring the best raw materials that nature has to provide. Further, we seek a noteworthy diversity of sources from within the six sub-appellations of the region, giving us a broad palate of flavors and profiles from which to assemble our blends. So, whether it is the Dundee Hills, Ribbon Ridge, the Eola-Amity Hills, Yamhill-Carlton District, Chehalem Mountain area, or McMinnville, we are there, spending time with our growers in their vineyards each week, from flowering all the way through harvest. 

The ”North Valley Vineyard”, located in Yamhill-Carlton, is adjacent to Shea, Penner-Ash and Beaux Freres. It is one of two Estate vineyards, the other is Aegrina in the McMinnville AVA. The two sites produce distinctive fruit and contribute depth and complexity to the regional blends. 

VALUED PARTNERSHIPS,
RESPONSIBLE PRACTICES
Our grower partnerships are deeply meaningful engagements where shared risks in vineyard farming practices assure us of maximal quality in producing our wines. “North Valley Cooperative” and “North Valley Collective” are naming contsructs that reflect the intention of our grower relations. The personal relationships we enjoy with our growers are further enhanced by our additional commitment to certified sustainable vineyard practices (generally L.I.V.E. or Salmon Safe specifically) ensuring responsible stewardship of our precious land and resulting in the highest quality of fruit we can harvest for our wines. 

Some of our esteemed vineyard sources (and grower partnerships) include Zena Crown in the Eola-Amity Hills, Roe & Roe in Ribbon Ridge, Gran Moraine in Yamhill-Carlton, and of course our own home vineyard sites: Aegrina in McMinnville and The North Valley Vineyard in Yamhill-Carlton.

WHAT DRIVES US
. To grow and craft certifiably earth-friendly, sustainably-farmed wines that are examples of the northern Willamette Valley at its qualitative best.

. To represent the region through wines that speak eloquently about the Willamette Valley's gifts of latitude, climate and soils.

. To recognize and demonstrate that the greatest concentration of top Pinot Noir and Chardonnay vineyards originate in a small area called the northern Willamette Valley.

. To work with committed, passionate growers within the region who share our dual vision of representing tremendous quality, while using responsible practices - real human beings connected to the real origins of these wines.

. Our North Valley wines are a virtual road map to our region and a celebration of this place.

properties.title: Nysa Vineyard
properties.description:
Founded in 1990 by owner and winemaker Michael Mega, Nysa Vineyard was built on a foundation of passion, dedication and patience. Located in the heart of the Dundee Hills, it has grown into one of the region's most esteemed vineyard sites, supplying exceptional Pinot Noir grapes to top producers throughout the Willamette Valley. 

At Nysa, winemaking begins in the vineyard, where organic farming practices and a commitment to sustainability guide every step.The wines are thoughtfully crafted to achieve complexity, concentration and balance. Finesse, elegance and depth is obtained in the vineyard, but only years in the bottle allow these features to fully express in your glass. We've done that aging for you.

Wine tastings are offered at the winery, where you’ll enjoy our current releases of Sparkling, Chardonnay, and Pinot Noir, along with a selection of gracefully aged wines. Tastings are guided by our knowledgeable team and take place among the vines, with stunning views overlooking the valley.

properties.title: Open Claim Vineyards
properties.description:
We founded Open Claim Vineyards to grow benchmark Pinot Noir and Chardonnay on a Willamette Valley property our family has tended for nearly 30 years. Honoring the land and respect for nature inspires all of our decision making - from the careful preservation of our property's oak enclave and wildlife corridor to our commitment to sustainable winegrowing and dry farming. Since inception we have farmed organically and are strongly committed to the responsible stewardship of our most valued resource, our vineyard and its soil.

Your visit to Open Claim Vineyards represents the fullest expression of our vision for the vineyard — and we can’t wait to have you here. Join for a highly personalized experience that includes:

— A walking tour through the natural beauty of our grounds, vineyard and gardens 
— Seasonal tastes from our creative chef, paired with selected Open Claim Vineyards wines 
— A visual feast, explored in spaces shaped and adorned by local artists and artisans 

Each visit is casual and unhurried, lasting a little over two hours. While you’re here, you and your companions will have our undivided attention. 

On behalf of our entire team, we hope to see you soon.

properties.title: Penner-Ash Wine Cellars
properties.description: In 1998, Lynn and Ron Penner-Ash founded Penner-Ash Wine Cellars in the Northern Willamette Valley’s Yamhill-Carlton sub-AVA. The pair built their LIVE (Low Input Viticulture & Enology) Certified sustainable gravity-flow winery surrounded by a 15-acre Estate Vineyard. The building seems to spring from the land itself; a reflection of the values, spirit and winemaking philosophy of Penner-Ash. Thanks to longstanding relationships with grower neighbors and friends, Penner-Ash sources fruit from the Willamette Valley’s most distinguished vineyard sites.

properties.title: Pike Road Wines
properties.description: At Pike Road, we believe great winemaking starts with great farming. That's why we’ve made it our mission to support small family-owned vineyards to create wines of quality, value and integrity, sourcing fruit from over 20 farms in Oregon’s northern Willamette Valley covering six unique sub-AVAs: Chehalem Mountains, Dundee Hills, Eola-Amity Hills, Laurelwood, Tualatin Hills & Yamhill Carlton. With over four decades of experience at Pike Road’s sister winery Elk Cove Vineyards, our family has a long history here in Oregon’s Willamette Valley. We are committed to preserving family farms through our longtime partnerships with growers from around the valley.

properties.title: Ponzi Vineyards
properties.description:
For over five decades, Ponzi Vineyards has been guided by a deep respect for the land, crafting wines that embody the quiet beauty and untamed spirit of the Willamette Valley. Nestled in the heart of the Laurelwood District AVA, our estate vineyards are home to some of Oregon’s oldest own-rooted vines, thriving in the energetically-rich Laurelwood soils that define our region.

Sustainability has always been our promise, evolving and improving each year to ensure long-term care of the land we farm. In the cellar, a philosophy of low-intervention winemaking—gravity-flow methods, native yeast fermentations, and careful handling—reveals the true essence of each vintage. Every bottle is a pure reflection of place, shaped by time, soil, and an enduring commitment to harmony.

Open daily for tastings 11am to 4pm, last seating at 3:30pm. Reservations recommended; walk-ins are welcome and subject to availability.

properties.Owner3: GOETZ RUPERT R REV LIV TRUST & GOETZ ANITA E REV LIV TRUST
SHEETS BILLY J & CRAIG ROSEMARY J

properties.title: Prince Hill Vineyards
properties.description: Prince Hill Vineyards, located in the renowned Dundee Hills AVA of Willamette Valley, personifies a dedication to craftsmanship and stewardship. This journey expresses the exceptional terroir of the region and embraces one of the most storied vineyards in Oregon winemaking history. Since 2017, the Duncan family has been the trusted stewards of this acclaimed site, sustainably farming Pinot Noir and Chardonnay.

properties.title: Privé Vineyard
properties.description: Privé Vineyard is a boutique winery crafting high-quality, estate grown Pinot Noirs. Our old-vine vineyard was planted in 1980 and remains own-rooted until this day. Our winemaking philosophy is to embrace the incredible Oregon terroir with a traditional approach. We produce less than 1000 cases of our Pinot Noirs, Chardonnay, Syrah and Ruby Port. Please visit our website for more information or to book an appointment.

properties.title: PROJECT M
properties.description:
PROJECT M is the vision of Winemaker Jerry D. Murray, who, after 18 vintages of making wines for others, decided it was time to focus on making the "wines that lived inside of him." PROJECT M explores the role of the "formative forces" in wine: People, Place, and Time. Our objective is to create things of beauty, pursuing the Four Virtues: Precision, Purity, Transparency, and Elegance.

You can experience PROJECT M'S Pinot Noirs, Chardonnay, Riesling, Pinot Blanc, and Sparkling Rosé at The Carlton Winemakers Studio Tasting Room.

Alternatively, you can schedule a private appointment to taste it with the winemaker himself. Many consider these experiences to be among the most engaging and memorable offered in the Willamette Valley. Jerry shares his passion and unique perspective, developed after more than two decades of global winemaking experience. You can expect a conversation about wine unlike any you will experience elsewhere, including rants and rabbit holes.

properties.title: Purple Hands Winery
properties.description:
It was all but inevitable that we'd make our living from the earth. Cody Wright, our founder and winemaker, was raised by esteemed pioneers of the Oregon wine industry. He spent childhood days wandering between vineyard rows and moving fermenters with forklifts. And his wife, Marque Wright, who assists in managing the winery business, grew up in southern Oregon amidst timber operations and cattle farms. Together, they are the soul of Purple Hands. Cody's official foray into winemaking took off after he completed a degree in environmental science at the University of Oregon. He worked in various vineyard management and winemaking roles at Ken Wright Cellars, and ROCO. Abroad, he further honed his craft at Knappstein Winery in Claire Valley, South Australia and Ata Rangi in Martinborough, New Zealand. In 2005, Cody established Purple Hands as a small boutique winery. In ten years time he and his wife Marque, transformed the winery into a cult favorite that produces several thousand cases a year of critically acclaimed wine. 

Our winery's name speaks to the earthen processes and exquisite products of winemaking. The toils and stains of working vineyards and crushing grapes that lead to elevated experience's combining flavors of food and wine. We hope you'll share our passion with friends and family and be uplifted by Oregons precise and pure expressions!

properties.title: R. Stuart & Co. Winery
properties.description:
R. Stuart & Co. Winery is located in the heart Historic Downtown McMinnville. We choose the best fruit in the Willamette Valley and bring it to our winery in the Granary District. Our goal is to make wines for life - ranging from our every day Big Fire wines to special occasion Reserve Pinots. In a celebration of Rob Stuart's passion for winemaking, we also make three méthode champenoise sparkling wines. All are handcrafted and made with love.

• Our tasting room is open daily: Mon-Wed, 2pm-8pm; Thu-Sun, 12pm-8pm. Our address is 528 NE 3rd Street, McMinnville, OR 97128.
• We happily offer tastings, wine by the glass, small bites, bottles to go, and more.
• Walk-ins are welcome, reservations required for groups of 6+.

Join us for a barrel tasting or a reserve seated tasting - we offer private, curated experiences to fit your group's needs and wants. You can book experiences through our website or directly via email (susanne@rstuartandco.com).

properties.title: Rain Dance Vineyards
properties.description:
Our winery is located in Newberg, Oregon, just a vineyard stroll up the hill from Oregon’s renowned Allison Inn and Spa.

Our tasting room is a 1926 farmhouse that was elegantly and meticulously remodeled in 2012. Our extensive patio, with a gas fire pit, overlooks our exquisite gardens, fountains, ponds and vineyards.

While Pinot Noir is our main focus, we also produce a Gamay Noir, and an array of crowd-pleasing whites, including Pinot Noir Rosé, Chardonnay, an off-dry Riesling and even a dry Gewürztraminer. Our five-six wine flight is $35, and the fee is waived with a three-bottle purchase and complimentary for members and their guests.

Tastings are held Thursday-Monday from 11AM to 5PM. 

Reservations are appreciated, but walk-ins are always welcome!

Please respect our policy of no pets or outside food. Thank you!

properties.title: Raptor Ridge Winery
properties.description:
Perched on a ridge in Oregon’s Laurelwood District AVA, Raptor Ridge Winery is a sanctuary for native birds of prey — and for guests seeking a peaceful, vine-side tasting experience. Open year-round, our tasting room offers sweeping views of four Cascade Range mountaintops and a tranquil escape from the everyday. Guests can enjoy curated tasting flights, a shorter abridged flight, or wines by the glass and bottle — all served alongside warm hospitality and stunning vineyard views.

We craft our wines from sustainably farmed vineyards, including our LIVE-Certified estate, Tuscowallame Vineyard. In addition to classic Pinot Noir and Pinot Gris, we produce distinctive varietals such as Auxerrois, estate-grown Grüner Veltliner, and traditional method sparkling wines.

Tasting appointments may be made by clicking Book Now above, by calling us at 503-628-8463, or emailing info@RaptorRidgeWinery.com.

properties.Owner3: SHULL SCOTT EVAN & SHULL ANN LOUISE
SHULL SCOTT EVAN & SHULL ANN LOUISE
SHULL SCOTT EVAN & SHULL ANN LOUISE

properties.title: Remy Wines
properties.description:
Founded in 2006 by native Oregonian and queer winemaker, Remy Drabkin, Remy Wines is a Willamette Valley winery rooted in service to the community. Much like its visionary founder, Remy Wines honors Old-World winemaking traditions with a fresh, progressive voice and undeniable flair.

Remy Wines boasts an impressive portfolio of Italian-style wines made primarily with Oregon fruit and a welcoming, unpretentious farmhouse tasting room in Dayton, Oregon. Remy Wines accepts walk-in visits Thursday through Sunday from 12 to 5pm, with no reservation required.

For more information, please visit remywines.com.

Our porches and front lawn are a great place to spend an afternoon in wine country. Dogs are welcome on the grounds and porches, but not inside the tasting room. Indoor and semi-heated porch tastings offered.

properties.title: Résonance
properties.description:
EXPRESSIVE WINES WITH A BURGUNDIAN ACCENT
Established in 2013, Résonance is nestled in the Yamhill-Carlton AVA, a hidden gem within the Willamette Valley, just west of the charming town of Carlton. Our journey began when Maison Louis Jadot sought to create its first winery outside of Burgundy. We craft Chardonnay, Pinot noir, and Rosé from our certified organic vineyards within three nested AVAs in the Willamette Valley. Visitors are welcomed with stunning views of our vineyards and the Pacific Coast Range, paired with warm hospitality and wines that authentically reflect the character of this unique terroir.

properties.title: REX HILL
properties.description: REX HILL, a legacy winery in Oregon’s Willamette Valley, has been making elegant Pinot Noir for over 40 years, offering authentic wines of the utmost quality and distinction. The commitment to quality means year-round responsiveness to site, vintage and climate, farming with organic and Biodynamic principles. After an extensive renovation in 2020, REX HILL’s historic tasting room offers expansive outdoor views, a growing culinary program and cozy yet modern furnishings.

properties.title: RH Wines at Redhawk Vineyard
properties.description: RH Estate Wines is a family-owned winery producing premium Pinot Noir, Pinot Gris, Dolcetto, and Riesling. We welcome guests year-round to enjoy these wines and other robust red varietals in our tasting room, while soaking in stunning valley views or picnicking in our wooded park.

properties.title: Ricochet Wine Company
properties.description:
Ricochet Wine Company was founded with a focus on community: the connection, the collaboration, and the compassion. 

We believe wine is meant to be shared. A bottle is opened to enjoy with others - for a conversation, for a meal, for a moment of friendship. And we make killer, sophisticated, honest wine that is accessible to a wide spectrum of folks.  

We give back to those in need by donating 5% of our wine sales to local and regional non-profit organizations who specialize in helping people bounce back from difficult situations. Because life is full of metaphoric ricochets.

Located in the heart of the quickly growing “Indie Wine District” in McMinnville, our Ricochet Et al. Wine Bar is a comfortable and laid-back hangout where you can sample Ricochet wine releases & more. 

The Ricochet Et al. Wine Bar is located inside our winery, right next to all the action of our production space where we craft our wines. An industrial-chic lounge with prime views of where all the magic happens.

We’re open Friday through Monday for reservations & walk-in visits, and Tuesday through Thursday by appointment only.

properties.title: Ridgecrest
properties.description: With five decades of experience and the first vines planted on Ribbon Ridge, each bottle of Estate-grown Pinot Noir, Riesling, Chardonnay, Pinot Gris, Grüner Veltliner, Chenin Blanc and Gamay Noir we craft is reflective of the Willamette Valley's reputation as one of the worlds truly special wine regions.

properties.title: ROCO Winery
properties.description: Veteran winemaker Rollin Soles has been producing distinctly defined Oregon wines and garnering high praise from critics and enthusiasts for more than 27 years. Recently named one of the top 20 most admired winemakers in North America, Soles focuses his attention on his passion project, ROCO Winery, which he started with his wife Corby in 2002. His wines display the expertise of making wine in Australia, California, Switzerland and Washington as a young man before co-founding Argyle Winery in 1987. Dedicated to crafting world-class wines, ROCO Winery has distinguished itself as an outstanding producer of Oregon Pinot Noir and Chardonnay, and Méthode Champenoise sparkling wine. ROCOs Wits End Vineyard, located in the Chehalem Mountains, demonstrates Soles meticulous farming practices and his dedication to sustainability.

properties.title: Rodeo Hills Winery
properties.description:
Vintage expressions lovingly grown from our seven acre Dundee Hills vineyard

Winemaking by Jared Etzel with intent to stand alongside the world’s finest Pinot Noir & Chardonnay

Offering tastings by appointment - from 10a - 5p.

properties.title: Rose and Arrow Estate
properties.description: Come discover why our acclaimed Pinot Noirs taste like no other. We spent a decade searching for tiny threads of volcanic rock that produce distinctly Oregon Pinot Noirs and Chardonnay. We found our answer in nine micro-plots. Join us and experience the acclaim. Visit roseandarrowestate.com and follow us on Instagram.

properties.title: Résonance Dundee Hills Tasting Room
properties.description: We welcome you to enjoy our new Dundee Hills Tasting Room on the Découverte Vineyard surrounded by certified organic vines and shaded by century-old oaks. This beautiful, reclaimed barnwood tasting room features estate flights, rotating glass pours, and small-bite wine country delicacies. Join us along the bar or on the patio for a resonant experience in the Dundee Hills AVA.

properties.title: Saffron Fields Vineyard
properties.description:
Our woman-owned Willamette Valley winery offers stunning views of the Coast Range and our Hoichi Kurisu-designed Japanese garden. Here, winemaker Tony Rynders crafts Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, and Rose with balance and complexity that are authentic expressions of our estate's rich soils and coastal influences. Immerse yourself in contemporary art and architecture as you experience the excellence of world-class estate-grown wines. Sit beside our ever-vibrant koi pond as you enjoy a charcuterie board and take in the sun-speckled landscape spreading westward towards the coastal mountains. Reserve a seated tasting or immersive experience through our website. 

Walk-ins are welcome. We respect and appreciate the LGBTQIA+ community. We are 'leashed' pet friendly.
 
Saffron Fields Vineyard hosts numerous events throughout the year, making it a must-visit destination for the Oregon wine tourist. Visit our website for a listing of upcoming events or to make a reservation. The nearby towns of Carlton, Newberg, and McMinnville boast lodging ranging from quaint country inns to luxury wine country resorts.

properties.title: Seufert Winery
properties.description: Seufert Winery handcrafts distinctive wines that capture the essence of Oregon. Attentive small-batch production of single vineyard Pinot noir and select white varieties showcase unique Willamette Valley terroirs. Limited volume allows winemaker Jim Seufert, a fourth generation Oregonian, to focus on wine quality, resulting in what he calls wine with soul. Contact us for tasting appointments, wine availability, and pre-release wine allocations.

properties.title: Shea Wine Cellars
properties.description: Founded by Dick and Deirdre Shea in 1996, Shea Wine Cellars is a producer of world-class Pinot noir and Chardonnay made from Shea Vineyard fruit.  They now use 20% of Shea Vineyard’s production for their own effort and sell the remaining grapes to some of the finest Pinot noir producers in Oregon, California and Washington.

properties.title: Siltstone Wines
properties.description: Siltstone Wines was established in 2000 by the Myers family in Oregon's renowned winegrowing region, the Willamette Valley. They produce authentic Oregon wine with their estate grown Pinot noir, Pinot gris, Sauvignon blanc and Rose of Pinot noir. All of the Myers family vineyards are farmed Certified Sustainable by the Food Alliance. Joel Myers first planted grapes in the 1960s and has been farming premium wine grapes professionally since 1980 with his wife Louise. They carry on that tradition today with two of their sons, Joey and David. Their son John helped develop the family business and is now practicing law while his wife Melissa is working in Public Health after spending many vintages on the crush pad. David's wife, Heather, manages the tasting room and marketing for Siltstone. The Myers produce about 1,000 cases of wine under the Siltstone label from Guadalupe Vineyard, Blacktail Vineyard, and Owl Ranch Vineyard. A limited quantity of their premium Pinot noir label, J. Myers & Sons, is blended from select barrels after exceptional vintages.

properties.title: Sineann
properties.description: At Sineann, we source fruit from some of the best vineyards in the Northwest and New Zealand. We make several Pinot noirs, Pinot gris, Cabernets, Gewurztraminer; Merlot, Sauvignon Blanc, Riesling and Zinfandel (off the oldest vineyard in the Northwest). Our growers take great pride in their work; we're very proud of the wines we make from their vineyards.

properties.title: Six Peaks
properties.description: Six Peaks is owned and operated by the Albin family and features vineyards planted in 1981. Formerly known as J. Albin Winery, Six Peaks is known for handcrafting Estate-grown, exceptional Pinot noir, Pinot gris, and sparkling wines of great finesse.

properties.title: Sokol Blosser Winery
properties.description:
At Sokol Blosser Winery, we offer a multitude of options to help you plan your perfect wine tasting experience. Although we recommend making a reservation online or giving us a call to reserve your table, we do accommodate walk-ins. Our seated tastings allow us to customize your tasting experience and add on culinary options from butcher's boards with a selection of meats and cheeses to culinary delights from our estate chef. 
 
Farm & Forage, our acclaimed food and wine pairing experience, is held Friday through Sunday at 1pm and requires a reservation. We host a Happy Hour in our Wine Bar from 5-7pm each Friday with a different theme every week. Every Saturday we offer a tour and wine tasting experience 10:30am. We’ll be firing up our pizza oven Memorial Weekend and running it seven days a week through the summer. Starting in June, you can join us for music and Frosé every Thursday for Live on the Lawn. Keep an eye out for Sunday vineyard hikes starting in July. 
 
More than 50 years ago, the Sokol Blosser family began growing grapes in the Dundee Hills of Oregon's Willamette Valley. Situated on a certified organic 88-acre vineyard in the Dundee Hills, with a new second 22-acre vineyard called Kalita in the Yamhill-Carlton AVA, and farming another 15 acres of vineyards in the Eola-Amity Hills, B Corp-certified Sokol Blosser Winery consistently captures the terroir of the region as expressed through the brilliance of its Estate fruit. One of the pioneering wineries of Oregon, Sokol Blosser is run by the Sokol Blosser family, who emphasize sustainability and good to the earth policies in every phase of the business.

properties.title: Soléna Estate
properties.description:
Soléna is a combination of Spanish and French words Solana and Soleil, celebrating the sun, the moon and cycles of life. We were launched in May of 2000 when our owners purchased our 80-acre estate which became the Domaine Danielle Laurent vineyard.

Furthering their successful careers in the Oregon wine industry, Laurent Montalieu and Danielle Andrus Montalieu gifted this vineyard to each other for their wedding, and began making wine under the label named Soléna after their daughter.

Soléna Estate showcases the beauty of terroir in our site-specific wines. We craft delicious wine from our own estate vineyards in Yamhill-Carlton and McMinnville AVAs, as well as iconic single-vineyards around the Northwest. 

We're well known for consistent, ageable Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, Pinot Gris, and Cabernet Sauvignon. However, our entrepreneurial spirit means we keep expanding our offerings. Visit our picturesque vineyard and tasting room in Yamhill, Oregon and raise a glass to celebrate friends, family, and life!

properties.title: Soter Vineyards
properties.description: Native Oregonians Tony and Michelle Soter established Soter Vineyards in 1997 following Tony's distinguished career as consulting winemaker, organic farmer, and founder of Etude in Napa, CA. Soter Vineyards makes its home at Mineral Springs Ranch, a biodynamic farm and vineyard located in the heart of Oregon wine country. Today, Tony carries on Michelles legacy in an uncompromised commitment to their ideals in farming, winemaking, and environmentalism.

properties.title: St. Innocent Winery
properties.description: St. Innocent Winery was founded in May 1988 by Mark Vlossak, the current winemaker and president, as well as eight investors. St. Innocent produces small lot, handmade wines. The winery has purchased a 47.5-acre property in the South Salem Hills and has planted 15 acres of their own vines, including Pinot noir and Chardonnay. St. Innocent also works closely with local growers in an effort to emphasize the beauty and personality of single vineyard designated Pinot noirs. Unique sites produce grapes that have a concentration of the flavors reflective of their site-based terroir. Maintaining a close working relationship with growers allows a collaborative fine-tuning of viticultural techniques in order to capture these flavors and aromas in the wines.The philosophy of winemaking at St. Innocent is to illuminate the function of wine: to complement and extend the pleasure of cuisine. Characteristics of wine enhance and alter the perception of different food and flavor combinationsthis interaction amplifies the enjoyment of a meal.

properties.title: Stoller Family Estate
properties.description:
Welcome to Stoller Family Estate. Our estate offers a selection of experiences designed to make your visit an unforgettable trip to Oregon wine country.

Stoller Family Estate is a 400-acre parcel located on the southern slope of the Dundee Hills. Pioneering Oregonian and Founder Bill Stellar purchased his family’s second-generation farm in 1993 with the vision of cultivating an enduring legacy for the land and the Oregon wine industry. Over the last two decades, Bill has patiently transformed the property into the largest contiguous vineyard in the Dundee Hills. Our estate features the world’s first LEED Gold-certified winery and a net-zero tasting room with panoramic vineyard views.

Our doors are open daily from 10:30 am to 5:30 pm for tastings and wine pickup. Reservations available, walk-ins always welcome!

We will be closed Christmas Day and New Year’s Day.
We will be closing at 3 pm Christmas Eve and New Year’s Eve.

To explore our offerings or make a reservation, give our concierge team a call at (503) 864.3404. For parties of 13 or more please call our team. We are happy to talk through options and availability.

Please note: Well-behaved dogs who are kept on a leash at all times are welcome to accompany any seasonally available outdoor tasting experience, such as our patio or lawn. As we are a full food service establishment, dogs are not permitted indoors.

Toasting you all in good health and spirits,
The Stoller Family Estate Team

properties.title: Stoney Wines
properties.description:
Stoney Wines produces premier, luxurious, single-acre estate wines from Oregon’s Willamette Valley. As a virtual micro-producer, we craft small-lot, award-winning Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, Riesling, Cabernet Franc, Pinot Gris, and Rosé of Pinot Noir (still and sparkling).

Founded in September 2019 by Donna Stoney—one of the few Black women producing estate wines in the Willamette Valley—Stoney Wines represents both exceptional craftsmanship and cultural impact in an industry where representation has historically been limited.

Our wines are sustainably harvested, Salmon-Safe, and L.I.V.E. certified, crafted to be expressive, elegant, and approachable. But beyond sustainability and terroir, our foundation is deeper: community.

Donna’s African American heritage and lifelong commitment to service shape every bottle. Rooted in the tradition of storytelling, each varietal carries a piece of legacy—reminding us that wine is more than what fills a glass; it is a connector of people, histories, and shared humanity.

For more than 30 years, Donna served her community as a case manager for individuals with developmental disabilities. In 2019, she transformed that same spirit of service into winemaking—pioneering space, expanding access, and proving that excellence belongs in every room.

Stoney Wines is about far more than producing extraordinary wine. It is about leading with purpose, creating generational opportunity, and redefining who shapes the future of American winemaking.

Because families take care of one another, a portion of proceeds supports programs for individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities.

Today, Stoney Wines is more than a label—it is a movement. A celebration of craftsmanship. A declaration of presence. And a toast to what unites us all.

properties.title: Styring Vineyards & Winery
properties.description:
Open: Saturdays & Sundays, Noon-4pm.
Weekdays: By Appointment
RSVP: www.styring.com

Styring, a family-owned hidden gem in the Willamette Valley, has been crafting award-winning wines for more than two decades while overlooking the rolling hills of Styring Vineyards and the Oregon Coast Range. Nestled in Oregon's elegant Ribbon Ridge AVA, Styring is off the beaten path, unpretentious, and devoted to exceptional wine. More than two decades of 90+ point reviews.

Appointments encouraged. Walk-ins always welcome! Complimentary non-alcoholic beverages for guests who aren't drinking alcohol.

properties.title: Sweet Cheeks Winery
properties.description:
We believe in wine. Sharing a bottle of wine has the power to bring people together, create thoughtful conversation, and change an ordinary day to something to remember. 

We started as a small vineyard, planted by our founder, Dan Smith who didn’t necessarily have dreams of starting a winery but fell in love with the landscape in the community of Crow, located within the countryside of Eugene, Oregon. He eventually built a winery, believing that wine brought about community.

Today we continue that mission, creating wine and experiences to bring people together. We take a relaxed approach to wine because enjoying a bottle doesn’t need to be complicated.

properties.title: Tendril Wine Cellars
properties.description: After more than 20 years making wine exclusively for others, winemaker Tony Rynders has launched two labels of his own Tendril and our little sister Child's Play. As the name implies, its all about the vineyards. Sourcing grapes from select vineyards in the Willamette Valley, our wines display the rare combination of both power and elegance. Production is limited. Join us for a tasting on our verdant lawn or spacious winery. Please call ahead for reservations, even if you're down the street.

properties.title: Terra Vina Wines
properties.description: Delicious! Is the adjective we hear the most when describing our wines. Many different varietals crafted in small lots, showcase the purity of each varietals flavor & uniqueness of the terroir of the finest Northwest vineyards. Cabernet Franc, Tempranillo, Sangiovese, Syrah & more.

properties.title: The Setting Wines
properties.description: Situated in the heart of Oregon's Willamette Valley, The Setting Wines' tasting room is located at The Setting Inn. The thoughtfully designed space invites guests to sample our acclaimed wines while basking in the understated luxury of the inn and the beauty of its surroundings. The tasting room features our Willamette Valley Pinot Noir and Chardonnay wines alongside our Sonoma County and Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon and Sauvignon Blanc wines.

properties.title: Torii Mor
properties.description: Torii Mor crafts small amounts of premium quality Pinot noir, Pinot gris, Pinot Blanc, and Chardonnay. Our devotion to quality begins in the vineyard and continues in the cellar, allowing us to create wine in a classic Burgundian fashion. Experience the wines and take in the beautiful Japanese garden with a breathtaking view of LIVE Certified Olson Estate Vineyard and the Willamette Valley. LEED Gold Certified.

properties.title: Trinity Vineyards
properties.description:
Trinity Vineyards is a family-owned boutique winery located just south of Salem, offering sweeping views of the Willamette Valley and Cascade Mountains. Known for sustainably grown wines and a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere, Trinity is a favorite local gathering spot for wine lovers, music fans, and families alike.

The winery specializes in Pinot Noir, while also producing standout Barbera, Sangiovese, Pet Nat, and other unique selections. In addition to wine, guests can enjoy craft beers, making Trinity an approachable destination for a variety of tastes.

Visitors are welcome to walk in and enjoy live music throughout the spring and summer months, often paired with local food trucks, including the on-site Season To Taste Vineyard Kitchen. The grounds are dog-friendly, and the hospitality from owners Steve and Cindy Parker adds to the warm, community-focused experience.

properties.title: Trisaetum Winery
properties.description:
Visit us on Ribbon Ridge to enjoy expressive wines and artwork crafted with intention by our artist and winemaker James Frey.

At Trisaetum Winery, we specialize in Pinot Noir, Riesling, Chardonnay and Sparkling wines. Daily, we offer a selection of red and white flights that you can enjoy outside on our covered patio or in our art gallery tasting room, where the creative intertwinement between art and wine is always on display. Or, for a uniquely immersive tasting experience, join us for a private tasting in our barrel cave.

We are also home to Brixeur Spirits, which was started by the family at Trisaetum in 2020. With vodka distilled from estate grapes, gins with locally foraged botanicals, and whiskeys aged in wine casks, our approach to spirits is heavily influenced by our winemaking roots. Spirits tastings are offered in the cottage on weekends, and in the wine tasting room daily.

properties.title: Trout Lily Ranch
