properties.description: Planted on the south side of Chehalem Mountains in 1976, Trout Lily Ranch is the newest label from historic Adams Vineyard focusing on estate grown pinot noir. Farmhouse tastings by appointment with charming views of the sustainably grown vineyard.

properties.title: Tumwater Vineyard
properties.description:
Tumwater Vineyard is only 20 minutes from downtown Portland. Our iconic vineyard and Barrel House Tasting Room is a short excursion to enjoy Oregon's wine country. Nestled around our 23-acre estate vineyard, enjoy gorgeous views as you sit on our patio or meander through our garden.

Our estate vineyard produces award-winning Chardonnay and Pinot Noir. We also source grapes from some of the most prestigious vineyards in the Willamette Valley and Washington to offer an expanded portfolio of delicately crafted wines. 

Visit us for our weekly events like Tumwater Tuesdays, Thursday Night Dinners, and Weekend Wine Tastings. Enhance your visit with our seasonal light bites menu crafted by our in-house culinary team led by Chef Tucker Mortensen.

Our beautiful venue is ideal for both private and corporate events. From intimate celebrations such as birthdays, baby showers, and retirement parties, to multi-day team meetings, weddings, and elegant, full-service dinners for up to 85 guests, we provide the perfect setting for every occasion.

properties.title: Union Wine Company
properties.description: Oregon is a place where opposites shake hands. It is a place where community built on individual strengths. It is a place where wild, open spaces meet industrial cities and farmlands are full of inspiring artists passionate about their craftsmanship. Investing in the kind of attention to detail that cares more about what goes into the glass than what type of glass it is. We named our company Union to honor these diversities and bring together the spirit and character of Oregon in a way that you can put on your table everyday.

properties.title: Utopia Vineyard
properties.description: Utopia is a grower-producer of premium Pinot Noir, Chardonnay and other varietals. The winery has been consistent over the last 20 years in its brand approach, which is to avoid all pretense and to be an approachable safe haven for the wine interested. Does it sound like a visit to Utopia could be added to your travel itinerary? Special Note: Dans definition of Utopia is The perfect place, and no place. If you visit, you will understand why. And a fair warning about Dans wines. When you taste them, you may experience Bliss, Paradise and Eden!Cheers!The Utopia Team

properties.title: Van Duzer Vineyards
properties.description:
Perched upon a windy knoll 2 miles down a dirt road in Dallas, Oregon (no not Texas … this is Oregon) about an hour away from just about anywhere, you’ll find Van Duzer Vineyards. Here, 82 acres of vines lie in the direct path of cooling marine winds that rush through a deep gap in the Coast Range—its namesake Van Duzer Corridor. In this wild, beautiful, out of the way place —where the winds blow just right — you'll find our meticulously crafted wines. We're a bit off the beaten path, but we think that's where the best adventures are found.

We specialize in balanced and lively site-driven wines that reflect the unique impact of the wind and the marine soils. As the oldest winery in the AVA, Van Duzer Vineyards has naturally evolved into the defining producer of cool-climate Pinot Noir in the Van Duzer Corridor.

properties.title: Violet Vines
properties.description: Violet Vines currently produces terroir-driven Oregon wines such as Pinot Noir, Syrah, Chardonnay, Albariño, and Chenin Blanc from both the McMinnville AVA and the Rocks District in Milton Freewater AVA. Guests can experience Violet Vines wines at our fully renovated, modern and inviting tasting room right on Main St. in Downtown Carlton, OR. Elevated tastings and tours are available seasonally at the breath-taking Estate Vineyard in Sheridan, OR by appointment only.

properties.title: Vitae Springs Vineyard and Winery
properties.description:
Nestled in the rolling hills of the Willamette Valley, just outside of Salem, Vitae Springs Winery is a historic vineyard with deep roots in Oregon’s wine heritage. Established on some of the region’s oldest self-rooted vines, our vineyard reflects the resilience and authenticity of Oregon’s wine culture, offering wines that are a true expression of place.

Our boutique wine offerings celebrate both tradition and innovation. Our portfolio includes elegant, site-driven Pinot Noir, Gruner-Veltliner, Pinot Gris, Riesling, and Chardonnay- each crafted with minimal intervention to showcase the vineyard’s natural characteristics. 

The tasting room itself is housed in a converted barn, preserving the rustic charm of the original structure while providing an intimate tasting experience. Our guests enjoy wines in a setting that is both historically rich and exposed to the elements, embracing the raw beauty of the vineyard.

At Vitae Springs, we embrace a regenerative farming philosophy, prioritizing soil health, biodiversity, and low-impact viticulture. Our vineyard is dry-farmed and cultivated using no-till practices, allowing deep vine roots to interact naturally with the soil’s unique composition. These methods not only enhance terroir expression but also contribute to a more sustainable and resilient vineyard ecosystem. We are passionate about restoring the land while producing wines that reflect its purest potential.

With a deep commitment to authenticity, sustainability, and the artistry of small-lot winemaking, Vitae Springs Winery is a tribute to Oregon’s past while embracing the future of winegrowing.

properties.title: Walnut Ridge Vineyard
properties.description:
We believe in producing high-quality fruit in harmony with the environment on our 30-acre, dry-farmed and hand-tended vineyard.

Walnut Ridge is a LIVE-certified and Salmon Safe producer of fine Oregon Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, Gamay Noir, Pinot Blanc, Riesling, Sauvignon Blanc, and Pinot Gris.

Our unique tasting room, modeled after the French Colonial–style architecture of New Orleans, sits on a slight knoll with 360-degree views of our vineyard as well as the surrounding vineyards, farms, hills, and forests. A wood-burning fireplace creates a cozy, inviting spot to enjoy a glass of wine on chilly fall and winter days, while an expansive three-level patio offers the perfect place to savor beautiful spring and summer afternoons.

properties.title: Walter Scott Wines
properties.description: Walter Scott is a small winery, founded in 2008 by partners Ken Pahlow & Erica Landon after years of living, studying and working within the Oregon wine industry. Our focus is to produce wines of elegance and purity, while conveying transparency of site and character of vintage. The winery is located in the Eola-Amity Hills just over an hour south of Portland, surrounded by some of the Willamette Valley"s most historic vineyards and overlooking the Cascade Range. We look forward to sharing our wines with all of you soon.

properties.title: West Hills Vineyards
properties.description:
Welcome to West Hills Vineyards.
To us, wine is synonymous with gathering. Coming together with family, friends, and soon-to-be friends over a good wine can fill your senses and feed your soul. We believe wine is meant to be shared and to create shared experiences, to combine fragrant flavors with lively conversation and laughter into lasting memories. 

Enjoy our wine while savoring the moment.

properties.title: Wetzel Estate
properties.description:
Wetzel Estate Winery was established in 1990. The winery and vineyard are nestled in Oregon’s scenic Willamette Valley.

Take a breathtaking-scenic drive through the rolling hills of the mid-Willamette Valley.  Our tasting room is located on the top of Butler Hill with amazing views of the Valley just due East.  On clear days you can see Mt. St. Helen's to the North and Mt. Jefferson to the East.

Enjoy indoor, sit down, private or patio tastings from a vast selection of affordably priced wines.

Order a champagne cocktail and charcuterie board and take in the sights.  

Make a day of it and visit various attractions close by.  Golf, museums and the Oregon coast await!

Wine produced at the Estate benefit from a nearly perfect location. The Van Duzer Corridor A.V.A. (American Viticulture Area), is an optimal location benefitting from the maritime air currents which provide cooler temperatures, allowing for longer fruit hang time and development of the signature flavor profiles. In addition, this region is comprised of well-drained sedimentary soil with high mineral content, a result of the Missoula floods from thousands of years ago. The vineyard is L.I.V.E. Certified, one of the most stringent sustainability standards for vineyards of the Pacific Northwest.

The brands have widespread domestic and international distribution. Varietals produced include Pinot Noir, Pinot Gris, Pinot Blanc, Riesling, Gewurztraminer, Marechal Foch, Chardonnay, and some limited-production specialty products including Sparkling Wines, a Ruby Port, Vin de Glace and Northwest Comfort the Wetzel family’s proprietary Gluhwein recipe.

properties.title: White Rose Estate
properties.description:
White Rose Estate aims to match our winemaking goals with the emotional connections you seek in your wine experience. Since our inception in 2001, we have discovered that people value how they feel when they drink wine more than the traditional emphasis on provenance. Over the past two decades, we have focused on understanding these connections and creating wines that fit each emotional experience.

First, we identified the most prominent ways people connect emotionally with wine: social experiences, learning, collecting, pairing wine with food, and the subjective beauty that can be found in wine.

Next, we studied the characteristics in a wine that best facilitate these experiences. For example, a collectable wine must age well over time while an educational wine must teach you about the winemaking process.

With this knowledge we define our winemaking practices, selecting the appropriate vineyards, winemaking techniques, and barrel aging regime to achieve our desired objectives. Each of these steps help us to craft wines from the ground up that match the emotional connection you seek through wine.

White Rose Estate is excited to share these emotional connections with you, challenging the traditional, sense of place based mindset that is seemingly ubiquitous within wine.

properties.title: WillaKenzie Estate
properties.description:
WillaKenzie Estate is a family-owned, estate winery located in the Yamhill-Carlton AVA, in Oregon’s Northern Willamette Valley. Our terroir is our inspiration. Our name, WillaKenzie, is a tribute to the ancient soils on which our vines are planted. Since breaking ground more than 25 years ago, we’ve been passionate about crafting wines that convey a sense of place.

Our winery tasting room and courtyard are nestled in the heart of our 420-acre estate, with spectacular vineyard views. Our Estate hosts are ready to welcome you to experience the beauty of WillaKenzie through our six distinct block-designate Pinot Noirs, our Estate Pinot Noir, as well as two small-production Chardonnays and additional bottlings, including Gamay, Pinot Blanc, and the Tourdion Cuvée Blanc, a signature blend inspired by the white wines of Alsace.

The signature of WillaKenzie Estate is its range of benches, ridgelines, elevations, slopes, exposures, and clonal plantings, making WillaKenzie one of the most diverse estates in the Willamette Valley. Spanning from 302 feet to 734 feet in elevation, the Estate was planted to six varieties and a host of diverse clonal selections, solidifying its reputation as a treasure chest for WillaKenzie’s winemakers.

We look forward to welcoming you to WillaKenzie Estate.

properties.title: Willamette Valley Vineyards
properties.description:
Willamette Valley Vineyards was established in 1983 by Oregon native Jim Bernau with the dream of creating world-class Pinot Noir. Willamette Valley Vineyards has grown from a bold idea into one of the region's leading wineries, listed as one of the top 100 Wines in the World by Wine Spectator Magazine, named "One of America's Great Pinot Noir Producers" by Wine Enthusiast Magazine, dubbed "Winery of the Year" by Wine and Spirits Magazine and named top wine tasting room in the nation in the USA Today 10Best Readers' Choice Awards. 

Jim believes that Pinot Noir, made with consideration for the environment, employees, and community, simply tastes better. All vineyards have been certified sustainable through LIVE (Low Impact Viticulture and Enology) and Salmon-Safe programs. 

Please join us to learn about the unique story of our winery as you take in sweeping views of the vineyard and valley at our Estate Tasting Room. Enjoy food and wine pairings in a relaxed setting with cozy fireplaces, an expansive patio, a spacious courtyard and a 65-foot lookout tower. Private tours, elevated tasting experiences and overnight stays at the winery are available by appointment.

properties.title: Winderlea Vineyard and Winery
properties.description:
Winderlea is a certified Demeter Biodynamic® vineyard and winery located on historic Worden Hill Road in the Dundee Hills of Oregon’s Willamette Valley, specializing in limited-production Pinot noir, Chardonnay, and sparkling wine. The estate vineyard was originally planted in the 1970s, and the winery was founded in 2006 with a focus on site-driven wines and responsible farming.

Today, Winderlea is stewarded by the Ricci family, fourth-generation Oregonians with deep roots in the state’s food, beverage, and agricultural communities. The winery remains committed to sustainability, small-lot winemaking, and a welcoming guest experience in its light-filled tasting room overlooking the stunning natural amphitheater of the Dundee Hills. As one of the first wineries in the world to earn B Corp certification, Winderlea continues to use its business as a force for good within Oregon’s wine community.

properties.title: Winter’s Hill Estate
properties.description: Estate grown wines, Spectacular views, Genuine hospitality. All of our wines come from our vineyards growing adjacent to the winery. Our vineyards were established over 25 years ago, but our roots in this land go back even farther. Seated tastings on our covered patio allow you to take in the views while appreciating the wines. Our experienced staff provide an exceptional experience, and we love to answer your questions about our wines or the region. Winter's Hill Estate is located in the heart of the Dundee Hills and includes extensive natural areas of forest and meadows, as well as a Native Oak Savannah restoration site and birding trail.

properties.title: Yamhill Valley Vineyards
properties.description:
Established in 1983, Yamhill Valley Vineyards is the oldest winery in the McMinnville AVA. Our wines are 100% estate grown and produced from our 150-acre estate located in the rolling foothills just outside of downtown McMinnville. 

Visit our amiable Tasting Room year-round for wine tasting and charcuterie with vineyard views, or relax under the oak trees on the back deck. Partake in our seasonal tasting experiences - Barrel Tasting in the winter and spring, and Guided Vineyard Hikes in the spring and summer - as a way to get to know our site and our wines even better.

The heart of our winemaking is dedicated to Pinot Noir with Pinot Gris, Pinot Blanc, Chardonnay, Rosé, and Riesling rounding out our production. From our beginning we have been stubbornly dedicated to the pursuit of a character that is distinctively Oregon and distinctively Yamhill Valley. Our goal is to bring forth from this unusual and exciting property the finest possible expression of its intensity, charm and uniqueness.

properties.title: Youngberg Hill
properties.description: Youngberg Hill is one of Oregon’s most highly regarded family-owned vineyards and wine experiences. Founded in 1989, our estate is known for wines with balance, depth, structure, and complexity while focusing on holistic and sustainable farming techniques. Our tasting room is open daily from 10-4 PM with no reservations required. For an elevated personal experience, you can make reservations for seated wine tasting experiences, vineyard & winery tours. The winemaker, Wayne Bailey, has been recognized as one of the top winemakers in the Willamette Valley. The combination of these things offers a unique wine country experience. Come taste the wine with us at the closest vineyard wine experience to downtown Mcminnville and savor the most spectacular view in the valley.

properties.title: Zena Crown
properties.description:
Since the 2013 vintage, Zena Crown Vineyard has crafted site-specific Pinot Noirs under its namesake - capturing the vineyard’s changing moods and expressions just as if it were a living, breathing thing. As Winemaker Shane Moore adapts to its rhythms and natural oscillations, he seeks to explore and manifest the singular voice of this special piece of land, in accordance with the remote and rugged beauty of the Eola-Amity Hills.

The wines are more than tannin structure and fruit notes. They are memories, songs, moments in time, unseen but palpable evolutions in nature, and spirituality. They translate the mystery of terroir through powerful, evocative Pinot Noirs.

The wines are crafted by winemaker Shane Moore at the Gran Moraine Winery and are available to taste at the Gran Moraine tasting room.

properties.title: Zenith Vineyard
properties.description:
Sustainability speaks to the vision we have of our job as winegrowers. The fruit for outstanding wines can only come from beautiful origins. At Zenith Vineyard we believe this is true from start to finish. Visit us in the Eola-Amity Hills and see for yourself our world class Pinot Noir, Auxerrois, Chardonnay, and Tempranillo.
Our onsite Tasting Room hosts 8 Zenith Vineyard wines as well as selections from our Custom Crush wine clients.
We host private events year round with outstanding indoor and outdoor spaces.
Onsite lodging is available at two farmhouse bungalows and our Zenith Vineyard Estate House. In addition we manage ATTheJoy just 1 block north from Zenith Vineyard.

properties.title: Forage Cafe
properties.description: Forage invites wine tourists from around the globe to enjoy a delightful culinary experience curated by Chef Kris Utz. This charming bungalow-turned-neighborhood restaurant offers a rustic-chic ambiance and a menu that celebrates wood-fired cuisine with locally sourced and foraged ingredients. If you've ever seen the movie "The Big Night," that's Forage. From savory wood-fired pizzas to delicate handmade pastas, scrumptious desserts, and vibrant seasonal sides and entrees, each dish highlights the bounty of the region, perfectly complemented by an exquisite selection of Oregon and global wines. Forage promises a low-key and quaint experience with amazing service that unites the flavors of the Pacific Northwest with unparalleled artisanal craftsmanship.

properties.title: Golden Valley Brewery & Restaurant - McMinnville
properties.description:
At Golden Valley, our craftsmen take the time & care to brew our own beer, make sauces & soups from scratch & house smoke our meats. Using fresh Oregon seafood, locally grown produce & our All-Natural brewery grain and grass-fed Angus beef.

Every day, we provide our guests with fine handcrafted beers from our brewery, all natural, dry aged Angus beef raised on our family ranch with spring fed pastures and Golden Valley Brewery grain, organically raised produce from our gardens, and excellent Oregon wines from the great Willamette Valley. Our diverse menu offers exceptional burgers, dry aged hand-cut steaks, pastas, fresh NW seafood, salads, sandwiches, and a full range of entrees. All of our food is made in house from scratch using fresh local ingredients whenever possible.

The McMinnville building was originally a warehouse built in the 1920’s and constructed with huge local Douglas Fir post and beam timbers and concrete walls. Some of the timbers are two feet thick and three feet wide and over twenty feet long. The building was a concrete shell when the Kirchers bought it in 1993 and with a crew of 35 guys working six days a week they converted it into a restaurant and brewery. We have been in operation for twenty-five years now. For the first seven years the establishment boasted only the big bar and concrete floors, no booths or woodwork on the walls just paint and sheetrock. In March of 2000, the establishment underwent major renovation. A carpenter installed 11,000 feet of recycled Douglas fir wood trim and added carpet, booths and new furniture in the dining room. We have remodeled and expanded the kitchen three times since opening in 1993.

properties.title: Grounded Table
properties.description: We’re a wine country restaurant in historic downtown McMinnville, Oregon. Our menu celebrates the seasonal bounty of the Willamette Valley, focusing on provisioners using practices like regenerative farming and small-batch craft. We’re excited and grateful to serve our friends and neighbors beautiful, down-to-earth cuisine made with loving intention, purpose, and joy.

properties.title: The Joel Palmer House Restaurant
properties.description: Named Restaurant of the Region by Willamette Week; top rating  Best Places to Kiss and Best Places NW. Featured in NY Times, Travel & Leisure, Food & Wine, listed in 1,000 Places to go Before You Die. Innovative and exciting menu featuring choicest local produce and wild mushrooms. Extensive Oregon wine list and full bar. We have re-opened! Tues-Sat, 4:30pm-8pm. Reservations required.

properties.title: JORY at The Allison Inn & Spa
properties.description:
JORY, the signature restaurant at The Allison Inn & Spa, is named after the rich soil that defines the Willamette Valley as a world-class wine destination. Our creative fine dining menus celebrate the abundance of the region's native flavors and tell the story of this remarkable place through each thoughtfully crafted dish. 

Now serving breakfast and brunch daily, along with an exquisite dinner offered à la carte or as a multi-course tasting experience. Seasonal ingredients are sourced from our own 1.5-acre garden year-round, with ten colonies of honeybees pollinating the crops and producing nearly 300 pounds of honey annually - a key element in many of our culinary creations.

Since opening in 2009, JORY has earned its reputation as the Willamette Valley’s premier destination for celebrating life’s most special moments. With thoughtful, attentive service and a passion for hospitality, our team will expertly personalize wine pairings from our extensive 500+ label list to complement each guest’s experience.

properties.title: La Rambla Restaurant
properties.description: La Rambla is a culinary gem nestled in the heart of Oregon's wine country, blending Spanish influences and classics with the freshest ingredients the Northwest has to offer. Featuring tapas, paella and luscious deserts, a large wine-friendly menu serving lunch and dinner daily. La Rambla's award-winning wine list features Oregon and Spanish wines. See website for latest hours.

properties.title: Park & Main Carlton
properties.description:
After 25 years in the wine, craft beer, hospitality and restaurant businesses in the Pacific Northwest, Dustin and Maryfrances Wyant opened Park & Main in April 2020.  “We wanted to create a living room for our community to gather over great food/drinks and honor the bounty of the Willamette Valley.”  Mission accomplished!  Locals can be seen dining (sometimes multiple days a week), on wood fired pizzas, creative locally sourced specials and unique (boozy) homemade ice cream.  Park & Main has become a basecamp for the Oregon wine country, where world famous winemakers blend seamlessly with international travelers and locals alike.

The vision of a community driven establishment also extends into what has become one of the best wine shops in the Willamette Valley. Oregon wines are well represented of course with single vineyard pinot noirs, Burgundian style chardonnay and a burgeoning selection of sparkling wine.  Additionally, a generous selection of Italian wines, smattering of French and Spanish wines sit alongside a large selection of Champagne.  Bottles are retail price (not restaurant) and no corkage is charged to open and enjoy with dinner.  A fine selection of local craft beer and cider is always rotating on the taps, along with a fun selection of mead, aromatized wines, amaro, vermouths, seasonal cocktails and N/A beverages.

properties.title: The Bay House
properties.description: After 45 years on the Oregon Coast, The Bay House found a new home in May 2025 in the heart of the Willamette Valley. Located in the charming town of Dayton, the restaurant now lives inside a beautifully restored historic church on the town square - transformed by proprietors Steve Wilson and Maureen O'Callaghan into an elegant yet welcoming fine dining space. Led by Executive Chef Nathan Bates, The Bay House culinary team works collaboratively to elevate simple, farm-fresh ingredients into thoughtful, refined dishes. Known for its world-class hospitality, The Bay House is one of only four AAA Four-Diamond restaurants in Oregon and a recipient of The DiRōNA Award of Excellence in both 2024 and 2025. The wine program - one of the largest in the state - features over 2,600 selections spanning Oregon, Washington, California, and many of the world's great wine regions. Together, it all creates an experience that is both deeply personal and truly memorable.

properties.title: Trellis
properties.description: Trellis is where the valley goes to gather. Our seasonally inspired menus of delicious sandwiches, salads, & flatbreads to fresh seafood & Chef inspired dishes, all locally sourced from right here in the great Northwest. Proud to feature the valley's best selection of local wines, craft cocktails & microbrews. Come join us under the vines - Cheers!

properties.title: Tributary Hotel & Spa
properties.description:
Tributary Hotel, the first and only Relais & Châteaux property in Oregon, is housed in a historic, beautifully maintained 100-year-old building in the heart of McMinnville’s charming downtown. Ten thoughtfully-designed suites, each named for a different river within Oregon, feature curated amenities personalized for your visit, as well as complimentary concierge services to plan your entire stay.

The boutique luxury accommodations pay homage to the region, offering an immersive experience highlighting the Valley’s seasonal rhythms and terroir, as well as the producers and purveyors who contribute to its distinct cultural landscape. Every morning, guests experience the lavish, multi-course ōkta farm and kitchen breakfast in-suite featuring bespoke ingredients from our nearby regenerative farm and larder. As a gateway to the region, Tributary Hotel aspires to curate a luxury experience that inspires guest connections to the surrounding wineries, restaurants, and beautiful natural areas.

properties.title: Willamette Valley Vineyards
properties.description:
Willamette Valley Vineyards was established in 1983 by Oregon native Jim Bernau with the dream of creating world-class Pinot Noir. Willamette Valley Vineyards has grown from a bold idea into one of the region's leading wineries, listed as one of the top 100 Wines in the World by Wine Spectator Magazine, named "One of America's Great Pinot Noir Producers" by Wine Enthusiast Magazine, dubbed "Winery of the Year" by Wine and Spirits Magazine and named top wine tasting room in the nation in the USA Today 10Best Readers' Choice Awards. 

Jim believes that Pinot Noir, made with consideration for the environment, employees, and community, simply tastes better. All vineyards have been certified sustainable through LIVE (Low Impact Viticulture and Enology) and Salmon-Safe programs. 

Please join us to learn about the unique story of our winery as you take in sweeping views of the vineyard and valley at our Estate Tasting Room. Enjoy food and wine pairings in a relaxed setting with cozy fireplaces, an expansive patio, a spacious courtyard and a 65-foot lookout tower. Private tours, elevated tasting experiences and overnight stays at the winery are available by appointment.

properties.title: Wooden Heart
properties.description:
Wooden Heart is a family-owned and locally operated gem of Dundee, Oregon featuring wood fired seasonal food. Our cozy, chic space offers wood-fired pizzas and local fare crafted from fresh ingredients. Pair your meal with handpicked Oregon wines, craft cocktails, or local brews for the perfect dining experience. We've got all the flavors of our community at Wooden Heart - so come hang with us!

Reservations encouraged, Walk ins welcome!
Catering Services available! 

Lunch + Dinner
Thursday- Monday
11am - 9pm
Tuesdays & Wednesdays
5pm-9pm

Breakfast:
Friday-Sunday
8:30-12pm

properties.title: 3rd Street Flats
properties.description: 3rd Street Flats is the ultimate fusion experience, blending the best elements of hotels, B&Bs and vacation rentals into one unforgettable stay in Oregon Wine Country. With two locations in the heart of Historic Downtown McMinnville, choose from 11 uniquely inspired flats, all perched above local wineries, acclaimed dining and eclectic boutiques. Find us at 219 NE Cowls and also 555 NE Third Street, just three blocks apart in Downtown McMinnville. NOW OPEN. Find COVID-19 information on our website.

properties.title: A'Tuscan Estate
properties.description: A'Tuscan Estate Bed & Breakfast is located just five blocks from McMinnville's charming historic downtown and in the heart of Oregon wine country. The 1928 Colonial Style home has an Old World feel with private baths and full gourmet breakfast. Gracious service and warm hospitality abound.

properties.title: Abbey Road Farm Silo Suites B&B
The Allison Inn & Spa
properties.description:
The Allison Inn & Spa is Oregon wine country’s premier destination resort, set on 35 hillside acres in the heart of the Willamette Valley. Our 85 luxurious guestrooms and suites feature a private terrace or balcony, cozy fireplace, spa-inspired bathroom and original artwork, creating a serene retreat immersed in nature.

JORY Restaurant, named for the region’s rich soil, celebrates seasonal flavors through garden-to-table cuisine served at breakfast, brunch and dinner daily. Thoughtful, knowledgeable service is at the heart of every experience, with our highly trained team offering personalized wine pairings from our curated wine list of more than 500 labels to complement each dish.

Experience tranquility in a peaceful environment devoted to health and well-being. With more than 15,000 sq. ft., our award-winning wellness spa has 14 treatment spaces, spacious lounges with private outdoor patios, and a menu that captures the essence of the Pacific Northwest. Our indoor swimming pool, whirlpool, pool terrace, eucalyptus-infused steam rooms, cedar saunas and fitness studio elevate the guest experience.

With 25,000 sq. ft. of indoor and outdoor event space, we provide the perfect backdrop for weddings, corporate retreats and social gatherings. Thoughtful service, breathtaking scenery and an unwavering commitment to hospitality make The Allison Inn & Spa an unforgettable escape in the heart of Oregon wine country.

properties.title: AtTheJoy
properties.description:
Experience Oregon wine country at AtTheJoy, a luxury vacation home located in the heart of Willamette Valley's acclaimed Eola-Amity Hills. The home is surrounded by 24 acres of breathtaking vines of Anahata Vineyard. Take a deep breath and enjoy the serene existence that we call AtTheJoy. 
​
This iconic property, located just one hour south of Portland, is your very own secluded oasis. Enjoy more than just the verdant lawns and views, but the spectacular 6,500 sqft a 6+ bedroom luxury estate with endless amenities including an inground heated pool.

Available for special events!

properties.title: Atticus Hotel
properties.description: The Atticus Hotel is a luxury lifestyle hotel located in Historic Downtown McMinnville--the heart of Oregon Wine Country. With 36 uniquely inspired rooms--from Studios to a Penthouse--an onsite restaurant & bar, valet parking, concierge, Dutch bikes and more, the Atticus Hotel offers an extensive list of services & amenities in an unbeatable location.

properties.title: Bed & Breakfasts of Yamhill County
properties.description: See our website to explore 15 unique Bed & Breakfasts throughout Oregon's Wine Country.

properties.title: Black Walnut Inn & Vineyard
properties.description: Black Walnut Inn & Vineyard welcomes guests to an elevated experience in the heart of Oregon wine country. Our well-appointed nine-room villa is set above 100 acres of pinot noir and chardonnay vines, forests of Douglas Fir, and the Red Hills of Dundee. From our perch at an elevation of 950 feet, a spectacular view unfolds. Surrounding vineyards rest beneath an expansive horizon commanded by Mount Hood and Mount Jefferson. Visitors are afforded luxe accommodations and unmatched access to Oregon’s famed Willamette Valley.

properties.title: Cascadia Getaways
properties.description:
Cascadia Getaways is Oregon’s premier vacation rental manager, proudly independent and rooted in the Pacific Northwest. We specialize in memorable escapes across iconic destinations like the Oregon Coast, Mt. Hood, Central Oregon and of course Wine Country! From oceanfront condos to mountain chalets and vineyard getaways, each of our properties is curated for comfort, connection, and adventure.

Our team of hospitality pros and local Oregonians believes that where you stay should elevate how you experience the region. Whether you’re in town for a wine country weekend, family event, or a relaxing getaway, we offer direct booking savings, 24/7 support, and personalized recommendations to make your stay unforgettable.

Looking to list your property? Cascadia Getaways is proudly employee-owned and Oregon-only, with no national dilution or private equity pressure. We use smart tech and strong local roots to deliver exceptional results for homeowners and seamless service for guests.

Visit CascadiaGetaways.com to explore our growing collection of getaways or connect about adding your home to our portfolio.

properties.title: Chehalem Ridge Bed & Breakfast
properties.description: Perched on 8 acres atop Chehalem Mountain, Chehalem Ridge B&B offers a peaceful retreat near wineries with stunning views. 5 rooms in the contemporary house reflect the spirit of Oregon with in-room details like fireplaces, jetted tubs and private decks with expansive valley views. Full gourmet breakfast, accommodating food allergies, is included.

properties.title: The Dundee Hotel
properties.description: Relaxation and adventure await you in Dundee, the heart of the renowned Willamette Valley, where wineries and leisure abound. With a stylish vibe and touches of luxury, The Dundee is the perfect place to unwind and explore this world-class wine region.

properties.title: Fairfield by Marriott Portland-Newberg
properties.description:
Just opened March 2025!

Fairfield by Marriott Newberg, nestled in the heart of Oregon wine country right off Highway 99, is a serene retreat for work, relaxation or adventure, conveniently located minutes from stunning vineyards and picturesque landscapes. Discover famed wineries; enjoy a peaceful paddle on the Willamette Water Trail or a round at a golf course. Whether a romantic getaway, a family adventure, a corporate visit, Fairfield by Marriott is your welcoming haven in Newberg, Oregon. Unwind in guest rooms and suites thoughtfully designed for both work and relaxation; savor local art and décor evoking the Willamette Valley wine region; and enjoy our seasonal outdoor pool, exercise room, and complimentary Wi-Fi. Whether working or exploring, evening tapas and wine await at our onsite wine bar.

properties.title: Franziska Haus Bed & Breakfast
properties.description: Our new Log Lodge showcases a signature 29 foot high stone-crafted fireplace within its grand great room. Rustic architecture is contrasted with elegant Old World accents. Located in the heart of Willamette Valley Wine Country, this unique Inn offers exceptionally large and private suites, upscale amenities and comprehensive concierge services.

properties.title: Holiday Inn Express Newberg - Wine Country
properties.description:
Sip, Stay, and Savor in the Heart of Willamette Valley
Uncork the ultimate Pacific Northwest getaway at the  Holiday Inn Express Newberg - Wine Country. Perfectly positioned off Hwy 99, our hotel serves as your luxurious basecamp for exploring the world-renowned terroir of the Willamette Valley.

Whether you are a devoted oenophile or a casual taster, you are just minutes away from over 80 prestigious estates. Sip elegant Pinot Noirs at Rex Hill, explore the scenic vines of Elton Vineyards, or enjoy the refined hospitality of Rain Dance Ranch. For a touch of cinematic flair, don't miss a tasting at Francis Coppola’s stunning Domaine de Broglie.

properties.title: La Bastide Bed & Breakfast
properties.description: La Bastide. It’s not just the wineries, though there are hundreds nearby. And it’s not just the restaurants, despite the acclaim that local restaurants have earned. And it’s not just the local farms, produce stands, distilleries, or breweries. And it’s not just parks, trails, or the Air and Space Museum. And it’s not just the close proximity to Portland or the Oregon Coast. It’s all of these, and more. The Dundee Hills are home to some of the best wineries in the world. There are more boutique vineyards here than any place in the Northwest. You can wine, dine, and play here like no place else. And you can stay in some of the most comfortable and authentic inns in the world. La Bastide offers 7 comfortable guestrooms, each with a king- or queen-sized bed and private bathroom, and many with a fireplace. A memorable breakfast is included each morning. Your hosts, Mark and Elizabeth, are glad to help you plan your visit, whether it’s winery reservations, or a day-trip to the Oregon Coast.

properties.title: Lifestyle Properties Vacation Rentals & More
properties.description:
Lifestyle Properties offers an exceptional collection of vacation homes in Oregon’s picturesque Northern Willamette Valley. Our carefully curated selection features high-end rentals in prime locations, from charming walkable towns to tranquil countryside estates nestled among the vineyards.

Each property is designed to provide modern amenities and the comforts of home, ensuring a seamless and relaxing stay. Whether you’re seeking a cozy bungalow for a weekend getaway or a spacious estate for a group retreat, we have the perfect home to match your needs.

Our locally-based concierge team is here to enhance your experience with personalized recommendations and seamless service. Not sure which property is right for you? We’ll guide you to the ideal stay.

We also specialize in group lodging solutions, offering tailored accommodations for winery retreats, corporate off-sites, and special events. Let us help you craft an unforgettable experience in Oregon wine country.

properties.title: Olde Stone RV Resort
properties.description: Luxurious RV Accommodations Await Your Arrival, nestled in the heart of the Willamette wine country. Big-rig friendly, full hook ups, level concrete sites, providing a clean, convenient, welcoming environment making this park enjoyable. Our wonderful amenities include a heated seasonal pool, clubhouse, exercise room, two laundry rooms, dog run, WIFI and Direct T.V.  A beautiful, landscaped park with a concrete walking path to visit neighboring Evergreen Aviation Museum. Conveniently located, we are just a short drive to downtown McMinnville, a foodie’s paradise with wine tasting rooms galore. Come stay at our beautiful park to enhance your wine tasting experience bringing some of the best of Willamette wineries all within a short reach.

properties.title: Oregon Garden Resort
properties.description: Nestled in historic Silverton, Oregon, you will find the Oregon Garden Resort. Its tranquil here. Quiet and relaxing. Yet near Salem and less than one hour from Portland. Framed by rustic architecture and stunning views of the adjacent Oregon Garden and rolling hills of the Willamette Valley.

properties.title: The Gaard House
properties.description:
The Gaard House is a four bedroom Bed & Breakfast located on 45-acres near Carlton Oregon in the heart of the Willamette Valley wine country. 

Each newly renovated bedroom has a queen size bed and shares an updated bath with one other bedroom.

Every morning we are happy to serve a freshly prepared breakfast that focuses on local ingredients and northwest flavors.

The Gaard House is family-friendly, with a large recreation room with a theatre, pool table and dartboard. Outside there is a sports court for basketball, and pickleball. 

There is also a large deck with stunning views; perfect for breakfasts, gatherings, wine tasing and star gazing.

At the Gaard House we strive to provide Northwest hospitality with a nordic flair.

properties.title: The Ground
properties.description:
The Ground is a Yamhill County-based ecosystem of businesses that connect farms, food and people through hospitality. These farmstays provide an opportunity for guests to both relax and connect with agriculture, nature and each other. The Ground’s diverse B&B accommodations include Inn The Ground, a unique farmstay built into the hillside, the Yamhill House, a beautifully restored 115 year-old craftsman home co-located with the Ground’s Source Farms Retail outlet, and the Tabula Rasa Farmhouse, which opened in 2021. 

All of the Ground’s accommodations are located in Oregon’s beautiful Willamette Valley and feature connection between farm, food and people through regenerative farm tours and agrotourism experiences.

properties.title: The Market Lofts
properties.description: Steps away from world class tasting rooms & directly above local hotspot, Red Hills Market, our loft is located in the center of it all. Decorated with a blend of rustic wine country and industrial modern elements, our great room style studio, includes a living room area with a sleeper sofa. Measuring 600+ square feet, it is quite spacious and comfortable. Residing above Red Hills Market adds to the appeal & offers endless opportunities for fun...wood fired pizza, wine & more!

properties.title: The Park House McMinnville
properties.description:
The View & Vine Park House is a newly renovated luxury home just 2 blocks to award-winning Third Street in downtown McMinnville. You'll enjoy three King bed/bath suites, a dream kitchen and a stunning back yard.

You'll also enjoy an ideal location: within a 15 min drive to the Willamette Valley's top wineries AND a short walk to tasting rooms, breweries, restaurants & shops: walk score of 90.

properties.title: Tributary Hotel & Spa
properties.description:
Tributary Hotel, the first and only Relais & Châteaux property in Oregon, is housed in a historic, beautifully maintained 100-year-old building in the heart of McMinnville’s charming downtown. Ten thoughtfully-designed suites, each named for a different river within Oregon, feature curated amenities personalized for your visit, as well as complimentary concierge services to plan your entire stay.

The boutique luxury accommodations pay homage to the region, offering an immersive experience highlighting the Valley’s seasonal rhythms and terroir, as well as the producers and purveyors who contribute to its distinct cultural landscape. Every morning, guests experience the lavish, multi-course ōkta farm and kitchen breakfast in-suite featuring bespoke ingredients from our nearby regenerative farm and larder. As a gateway to the region, Tributary Hotel aspires to curate a luxury experience that inspires guest connections to the surrounding wineries, restaurants, and beautiful natural areas.

properties.title: Willamette Valley Bed and Breakfast
properties.description: An elevated wine country experience yet including all the details of home. 5 suites all have fireplace, two-person soaking tub, en-suite bath w/ heated floors, private deck, king bed, tv, wifi and more. We start each day with a 4-course breakfast. EV charging station for 2 vehicles. Within 10 minutes of 50+ wineries and all the best restaurants.

properties.title: Willamette Valley Vineyards
properties.description:
Willamette Valley Vineyards was established in 1983 by Oregon native Jim Bernau with the dream of creating world-class Pinot Noir. Willamette Valley Vineyards has grown from a bold idea into one of the region's leading wineries, listed as one of the top 100 Wines in the World by Wine Spectator Magazine, named "One of America's Great Pinot Noir Producers" by Wine Enthusiast Magazine, dubbed "Winery of the Year" by Wine and Spirits Magazine and named top wine tasting room in the nation in the USA Today 10Best Readers' Choice Awards. 

Jim believes that Pinot Noir, made with consideration for the environment, employees, and community, simply tastes better. All vineyards have been certified sustainable through LIVE (Low Impact Viticulture and Enology) and Salmon-Safe programs. 

Please join us to learn about the unique story of our winery as you take in sweeping views of the vineyard and valley at our Estate Tasting Room. Enjoy food and wine pairings in a relaxed setting with cozy fireplaces, an expansive patio, a spacious courtyard and a 65-foot lookout tower. Private tours, elevated tasting experiences and overnight stays at the winery are available by appointment.

properties.title: Youngberg Hill Inn
properties.description: Old world ambiance meets modern luxuries at Youngberg Hill. Our bed and breakfast is surrounded by a naturally romantic landscape, offering a one-of-a-kind lodging experience in Oregon wine country. The expansive veranda and in-room comforts like fireplaces and Jacuzzi tubs make each stay a relaxing retreat.

properties.title: Durant at Red Ridge Farms
properties.description:
Durant at Red Ridge Farms: A Destination for the Senses

Nestled in the Dundee Hills, Durant at Red Ridge Farms offers an authentic experience that delights the senses. Spanning 135 acres, the farm boasts estate olive groves and olive mill, lavender fields, a specialty plant garden nursery, a wine-tasting room, a farm shop, and breathtaking views of the surrounding vineyards.

At the heart of the farm, the Farm Shop provides daily complimentary tastings of award-winning Durant Olive Mill extra virgin olive oils at the in-house tasting bar—no reservations required. Visitors can enjoy olive mill tours, educational tasting experiences, gardening classes and workshops, and seasonal events. Don’t miss the annual Olio Nuovo Festival every November!

properties.title: Park & Main Carlton
properties.description:
After 25 years in the wine, craft beer, hospitality and restaurant businesses in the Pacific Northwest, Dustin and Maryfrances Wyant opened Park & Main in April 2020.  “We wanted to create a living room for our community to gather over great food/drinks and honor the bounty of the Willamette Valley.”  Mission accomplished!  Locals can be seen dining (sometimes multiple days a week), on wood fired pizzas, creative locally sourced specials and unique (boozy) homemade ice cream.  Park & Main has become a basecamp for the Oregon wine country, where world famous winemakers blend seamlessly with international travelers and locals alike.

The vision of a community driven establishment also extends into what has become one of the best wine shops in the Willamette Valley. Oregon wines are well represented of course with single vineyard pinot noirs, Burgundian style chardonnay and a burgeoning selection of sparkling wine.  Additionally, a generous selection of Italian wines, smattering of French and Spanish wines sit alongside a large selection of Champagne.  Bottles are retail price (not restaurant) and no corkage is charged to open and enjoy with dinner.  A fine selection of local craft beer and cider is always rotating on the taps, along with a fun selection of mead, aromatized wines, amaro, vermouths, seasonal cocktails and N/A beverages.

properties.title: Stoller Wine Bar | Newberg
properties.description:
Welcome to the Stoller Wine Bar | Newberg, where every sip tells a story. Explore award-winning wines from Stoller Family Estate, Chehalem Winery, History, Chemistry, and Stoller Swing. Centrally located in the heart of downtown Newberg, we offer a curated selection of wines, beer, wine-based cocktails, and non-alcoholic beverages, with perfectly paired plates available from the Stoller Wine Bar | Kitchen. If you’re looking for a late-night activity in Newberg, join us for a night of fun, friends, and fantastic wines. We can’t wait to welcome you to our community.

Hours at Stoller Wine Bar | Newberg:
Monday - Thursday: 3 - 9 pm
Friday - Saturday: 12 - 9 pm
Sunday: 12 - 7 pm

We will be closed on Christmas Eve, Christmas Day, and New Year’s Day.
We will closing at 9:30 pm on New Year’s Eve.

Reservations are available for your convenience, and walk-ins are always welcome! If you would like to make a reservation, bookings are available below or call our concierge team at 503-864-3404.

properties.title: Troon Vineyard Wine Bar
properties.description: Our McMinnville Wine Bar is a direct extension of the winery itself, warm and welcoming. Enjoy a taste of the Applegate Valley in the heart of Downtown McMinnville, Oregon. Open Daily from 12 pm - 8 pm.
